Whether they are rocking their baby to sleep or taking them on a living room adventure, this handcrafted basket is the perfect accessory for imaginative souls. Earth-friendly, durable, and oh-so-cute

name: QToys Premium Wooden Baby Gym with Animal Mobiles – Natural Montessori Activity Center
description:
Create a serene and stimulating environment for your little one with the QToys Wooden Activity Gym. Crafted with the philosophy that “less is more,” this beautiful A-frame gym is designed to encourage your baby’s physical and cognitive development without overstimulation.

Made from sustainably sourced timber with a smooth, natural finish, this gym blends seamlessly into modern, neutral, and Scandi-style nurseries. It features three delightful hanging mobiles—a playful duck, a gentle elephant, and a friendly crocodile—suspended at the perfect height to invite reaching, batting, and grasping.

As your baby lays beneath the sturdy wooden arch, they are introduced to the world of cause and effect, refining their hand-eye coordination and strengthening their core muscles during play. It is the perfect safe space for purposeful play, from newborn gazing to active reaching.

Key Features

  • Eco-Friendly Construction: Made from durable, sustainable rubberwood and finished with non-toxic, child-safe oils.

  • Engaging Mobiles: Includes three colorful yet gentle hanging toys (Duck, Elephant, and Crocodile) paired with wooden rings and shapes to stimulate visual tracking and tactile exploration.

  • Sturdy Design: The solid A-frame construction ensures stability while your baby plays, with rounded edges for maximum safety.

  • Montessori Inspired: Encourages independent play, freedom of movement, and sensory development in a calm environment.

  • Easy Assembly: Simple to set up and easy to dismantle for storage or transport.

Developmental Benefits

  • Gross Motor Skills: Encourages babies to reach out, kick, and stretch, strengthening neck, arm, and core muscles.

  • Fine Motor Skills: Grasping the wooden rings and textured toys helps refine finger dexterity.

  • Visual Tracking: The gentle movement of the hanging animals helps babies learn to focus and follow objects with their eyes.

  • Sensory Processing: diverse textures (smooth wood, fabric toys) provide essential tactile input.

Specifications

  • Material: Plantation Rubber wood, cotton strings, food dyes.

  • In the Box: 1 Wooden Frame (disassembled), 3 Hanging Animal Mobiles.

  • Age Recommendation: 0+ Months.
shortDescription: Capture the magic of early discovery. ✨ Our QToys Wooden Activity Gym is more than just a toy—it’s a developmental tool designed to grow with your little one. From their first focus to their first reach, give them the best start with natural, sustainable play.

name: Qtoys Natural Wooden Forest Puzzle Trees set of 3
description:
Bring the magic of the forest into your playroom.

Immerse your child in the wonders of nature with the Qtoys Natural Wooden Forest Puzzle Set. This beautifully handcrafted set features three distinct trees in varying shapes and sizes, accompanied by a charming, hand-painted wooden fox.

Designed for open-ended play, these aren’t just static figures—they are vertical puzzles. Each tree canopy is detachable from its trunk, offering a tactile engaging experience that encourages fine motor development and problem-solving skills. Children can mix and match the trees or practice fitting the organic shapes back together.

Perfect for “small world” play, this set creates an instant landscape for your child’s imagination. Whether the fox is hiding behind the oak or napping under the willow, the storytelling possibilities are endless.

Why we love this set:

  • Skill Building: The puzzle-style construction aids in hand-eye coordination and shape recognition.

  • Eco-Friendly: Crafted from sustainable plantation timber and finished with non-toxic, child-safe oils.

  • Aesthetics: With its natural wood grain and warm tones, this set looks beautiful displayed on a nursery shelf when not in use.

What’s Included:

  • 3 x Wooden Trees (removable canopies)

Recommended Age: 3+ Years

Key Features

  • Material: Sustainably sourced solid wood with food dye color and water based sealant

  • Design: Two-tone wood contrast highlights the natural grain.

  • Educational Value: Supports Montessori and Waldorf philosophies of natural, imaginative play.

  • Dimensions:Tallest tree approx. 25cm height.
shortDescription: Step into the woods 🌲🦊 Meet our newest arrival: The Qtoys Forest Puzzle Set. These aren’t just beautiful trees—they are puzzles! The canopies separate from the trunks for a fun fine-motor challenge. Perfect for autumn small world set-ups or a woodland-themed nursery.

name: Natural Coconut Sensory Scoop | Eco-Friendly Open-Ended Play Resource
description:
Invite nature into your child’s learning environment with the Qtoys Natural Coconut Sensory Scoop.

Harvested from real coconuts and smoothed to perfection, this scoop offers a unique tactile experience that plastic toys simply cannot replicate. Each scoop retains the natural beauty, curve, and texture of the original shell, helping children connect with the natural world during playtime.

This versatile tool is a staple for Montessori and open-ended play. Whether your little one is brewing “potions” in a mud kitchen, transferring rice and lentils in a sensory bin, or sorting pinecones and wooden treasures, this scoop is the perfect vessel.

Why we love it:

  • Tactile Learning: The warm, organic texture stimulates the sense of touch.

  • Fine Motor Development: ideal for practicing scooping, pouring, and transferring skills essential for hand-eye coordination.

  • Truly Sustainable: Made from upcycled coconut shells, this is a zero-waste, plastic-free addition to your toy collection.

Please note: Because this is a genuine natural product, each scoop will vary slightly in size, shape, and color markings, making yours truly one-of-a-kind. Pinecones and wooden board shown are for styling purposes only.

Features & Specifications

  • Material: 100% Natural Coconut Shell

  • Finish: Smoothly polished edges for safety

  • Recommended Age: 3+ (Perfect for sensory play supervision)

  • Care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth; treat occasionally with natural oil to maintain luster.
shortDescription: Bring the textures of nature into your playroom with our handcrafted Coconut Sensory Scoop. Perfectly sized for little hands, this sustainable vessel is the ideal addition to mud kitchens, sensory bins, and loose parts play.

name: Montessori Sensory Counting Board
description:
Unlock the joy of learning mathematics with the QToys Wooden Number Learning Board. Designed to grow with your child, this multi-functional educational tool takes little ones from basic number recognition to simple arithmetic. Crafted from sustainable wood with smooth, tactile finishes, it is the perfect hands-on resource for Montessori-inspired home learning or classrooms. From matching chunky wooden numbers to visualizing math with colorful counting balls, this board transforms abstract concepts into tangible fun. It even features a chalkboard strip for writing practice!

Key Features & Benefits:

Grow-With-Me Design: Suitable for ages 1.5 to 5+, covering developmental stages from toddlerhood to kindergarten readiness.

Multi-Sensory Learning: Combines visual (colors/numbers), tactile (wooden textures), and kinesthetic (moving balls/writing) learning styles.

Three Levels of Play:

Level 1 (Ages 1.5 – 3): Focuses on number recognition, matching chunky shapes, and tracing engraved numbers.

Level 2 (Ages 3 – 5): Introduces counting, quantity, and one-to-one correspondence using the counting slots and wooden balls.

Level 3 (Ages 4+): Teaches simple arithmetic (addition/subtraction) and subitizing (recognizing quantities instantly).

Includes Chalkboard Strip: A dedicated black bar at the bottom allows children to practice writing numbers or drawing arithmetic equations (chalk not included).

Eco-Friendly & Safe: Made from high-quality, sustainably sourced timber with non-toxic finishes, ensuring safety for young children.

What’s in the Box?

  • 1 x Wooden Activity Board (featuring counting slots, number tray, and chalkboard strip).

  • 10 x Chunky Wooden Numbers (0-9).

  • Colorful Wooden Counting Balls not included.

  • Instruction Guide included.
shortDescription:
Unlock the joy of learning mathematics with the QToys Wooden Number Learning Board. Designed to grow with your child, this multi-functional educational tool takes little ones from basic number recognition to simple arithmetic. Crafted from sustainable wood with smooth, tactile finishes, it is the perfect hands-on resource for Montessori-inspired home learning or classrooms.

From matching chunky wooden numbers to visualizing math with colorful counting balls, this board transforms abstract concepts into tangible fun. It even features a chalkboard strip for writing practice!

name: Montessori Bamboo Scoop & Sort Kit
description:
Turn playtime into a developmental milestone with the Montessori Bamboo Scoop & Sort Kit. Beautifully crafted and intentionally designed, this set is more than just a toy—it is an essential tool for early childhood development, inviting toddlers to explore, sort, and discover at their own pace.

Why Parents & Educators Love It:

Master Fine Motor Skills: The act of holding the bamboo scoop and transferring objects into the matching cups is the perfect exercise for building hand-eye coordination, grip strength, and wrist dexterity—skills that lay the foundation for writing and self-feeding.

Vibrant Color Recognition: With rich, earthy tones of red, orange, yellow, and green, your child will naturally learn to identify and categorize colors through hands-on play.

Eco-Friendly & Safe: Crafted from sustainable, natural bamboo and finished with non-toxic, water-based paints. It’s smooth to the touch, durable enough for years of play, and kind to the planet.

Endless Ways to Play: While perfect for the included sorting balls, this kit transitions seamlessly into sensory bins! Use the scoops and cups with rice, dried beans, kinetic sand, or acorns found on a nature walk.

What’s Included:

4 x Color-Coordinated Bamboo Sorting Cups

Matching Bamboo Scoops/Spoons

Set of Wooden Sorting Balls

Recommended for ages 3+ (Contains small parts)
shortDescription: Develop fine motor skills and color recognition naturally with this eco-friendly bamboo set. Featuring smooth, sustainable cups, scoops, and sorting balls, this kit is the perfect Montessori-inspired tool for sensory play and open-ended learning.

name: Bamboo Fairy House Play Set
description:
Ignite a spark of wonder and boundless creativity with our enchanting, integrated Fairy House Play Set, featuring the Bamboo Fairy Houses (set of 3), the Wooden Gnomes Set of 5, and the Wooden Fences Set of 4. This complete collection is designed to build a beautiful, whimsical world right in your playroom.

Setting the Scene: The three all-natural bamboo houses are gateways to make-believe, providing cozy, eco-conscious abodes for your tiny residents. Furthermore, the Wooden Fences—a set of four classic picket sides—add a touch of realism and organization, allowing children to customize and outline beautiful gardens or cozy yard spaces right outside the fairy doors.

Bringing Stories to Life: However, a village isn’t complete without its inhabitants! Therefore, the five Wooden Gnomes, each distinctly dressed in vibrant colours, are ready to embark on fantastical quests or simple daily routines. As a result, children instantly deepen their imaginative scenarios, exploring the dynamics of a bustling community.

Cultivating Essential Skills: This combined set encourages open-ended play, which is vital for holistic development. Moreover, as children immerse themselves in role-playing, they hone crucial problem-solving and lateral thinking skills. Additionally, navigating the social dynamics of their pretend world—like sharing the space or deciding where the fences go—fosters invaluable social and emotional competencies, including empathy, cooperation, and communication. By choosing these toys, you are investing in sustainable play that nurtures creativity, independence, and a deep respect for nature.

Approx dimensions of bamboo houses: 20cm highest, 15cm middle and 10cm smallest. Weight: 0.5kgs.
shortDescription: Ignite a spark of wonder and boundless creativity with our enchanting, integrated Fairy House Play Set, featuring the Bamboo Fairy Houses (set of 3), the Wooden Gnomes Set of 5, and the Wooden Fences Set of 4. This complete collection is designed to build a beautiful, whimsical world right in your playroom.

name: The  Montessori Writing and sensory station
description:
Unlock a world of tactile discovery with the ultimate sensory duo: the Montessori Sand Tray and the Bamboo Scoops Set of 3! This combination is essential for fostering fine motor skills, creativity, and independent learning in children aged 2 and up.

Engaging Sensory Exploration: The beautifully crafted Montessori Sand Tray, made from premium, durable timber, offers a sturdy canvas for all kinds of sensory materials. Whether you use sand, rice, or beads, this tray provides a captivating tactile playground. Furthermore, the included sand leveller adds an extra element of fun, encouraging children to smooth their canvas and start their creations anew. As a result, younger children can explore textures, whereas older children can use the leveled surface for practicing early writing and drawing skills.

Maximizing Play with Bamboo Scoops: However, the real magic happens when you introduce the Bamboo Scoops. Coming in a set of three different sizes, these stylish and resilient scoops are the ideal tools for rice play within the tray. Children use the scoops to pick up the rice and transfer it, filling up bowls or containers. Consequently, this action significantly promotes gross motor skills and sharpens hand-eye coordination.

Learning Through Open-Ended Play: Moreover, both the tray and the scoops are open-ended toys, inviting children to explore endless possibilities. Therefore, they encourage imaginative play where children create stories and develop language skills by expressing their ideas. This immersive, sustainable play set is a timeless educational keepsake that supports holistic development, turning simple play into an enriching journey of growth.

Dimensions of tray: 320x320x55mm
shortDescription: Unlock a world of tactile discovery with the ultimate sensory duo: the Montessori Sand Tray and the Bamboo Scoops Set of 3! This combination is essential for fostering fine motor skills, creativity, and independent learning in children aged 2 and up.

name: Deluxe Wooden Farm & Tractor Small World Set
description:
Bring the charm of the countryside right into your playroom with the Deluxe Wooden Farm & Tractor Small World Set. Designed to spark imagination and encourage storytelling, this comprehensive set provides the perfect backdrop for hours of open-ended “small world” play.

Unlike plastic alternatives, this set connects children with natural textures and materials. It features a sturdy, handcrafted wooden tractor ready for a day’s work, a collection of beloved barnyard animals, and scenic trees to set the scene. The included green felt play mat defines the space, creating a lush pasture for the animals to graze.

Why It’s Essential for Early Learning:

Language Development: As children voice the animals and narrate the farm’s daily activities, they rapidly expand their vocabulary and storytelling abilities.

Social & Emotional Growth: Small world play allows children to process the world around them, practicing empathy by caring for the animals and role-playing social scenarios.

Tactile Sensory Experience: The warmth of wood and the softness of the felt mat offer a calming, grounding sensory experience compared to cold plastics.

What’s Included in the Bundle:

1 x Handcrafted Wooden Tractor with rolling wheels

1 x Set of Wooden Farm Animals (includes cows, horse, pig, sheep, duck, and more)

6 x Wooden Eco-Trees (varying shapes for visual interest)
shortDescription: Spark endless storytelling with this complete “Small World” farm collection. Featuring a handcrafted wooden tractor, a diverse set of barnyard animals, eco-trees, and a lush felt pasture, this set provides everything a child needs to build their own thriving farm. Perfect for imaginative play, vocabulary building, and connecting with nature.

name: Christmas Tree Sorting & Sensory Tray
description:
Celebrate the festive season with a purpose! The Montessori Christmas Tree Sorting & Sensory Tray is a beautifully crafted holiday activity that blends the magic of Christmas with critical developmental milestones. This is not just a toy; it is an inviting “work” that challenges toddlers to focus, balance, and sort.

The set centers around a solid wooden tree tray featuring perfectly sized indentations. Children use the included bamboo tongs to transfer the vibrant wooden “ornaments” (balls) into the tree. This action requires concentration and steady hands, turning holiday excitement into a calm, focused learning session.

Developmental Benefits:

Fine Motor Mastery: Using the bamboo tongs strengthens the small muscles in the hand and coordinates the thumb and forefinger—essential preparation for holding a pencil later in life.

Cognitive Skills: The multi-colored balls encourage color recognition, counting, and pattern making. (Can you make a row of only red? Can you count how many green ornaments are on the tree?)

Focus & Patience: Successfully filling the tree gives the child a sense of accomplishment and extends their attention span.

What’s Included in the Bundle:

1 x Wooden Christmas Tree Tray with recessed divots

1 x Set of Bamboo Tongs (designed for small hands)

High-quantity set of 50 wooden sorting balls (Red, Green, Gold/Orange mix)

Specifications:

Materials: Solid rubberwood/acacia (depending on QToys stock specs), finished with plant-based oils and non-toxic water-based paint.

Recommended Age: 3+ Years (Warning: The sorting balls are small parts and may pose a choking hazard for children who still mouth objects. Adult supervision required).

Approx dimensions of Christmas tree tray: 37.5x20x1.8cms
shortDescription: Celebrate the season while building essential skills! This festive wooden tray invites children to practice fine motor precision by using the bamboo tongs to place colorful spheres into the tree. A perfect blend of holiday cheer and developmental learning, this tray works as a counting game, a color sorter, or a beautiful centerpiece for a holiday play shelf.

name: The Ultimate Wooden City & Roadway Builder Set
description:
Ignite your child’s inner civil engineer with the Ultimate Wooden City & Roadway Builder Set. This comprehensive small-world package moves beyond simple plastic tracks, offering a tactile, high-quality wooden road system that encourages complex planning and imaginative play.

Children can design their own bustling metropolis by connecting the puzzle-style road segments, obeying (or creating!) traffic rules with the included signage, and navigating the colorful wooden fleet through a forest of eco-trees. It is the perfect open-ended toy for developing spatial awareness and storytelling skills.

Why It’s a Playroom Essential:

STEM Learning: Planning road layouts fosters problem-solving and basic engineering skills.

Social Play: Large enough for siblings or friends to build a town together, encouraging cooperation and negotiation.

Complete Ecosystem: Includes everything needed to start playing immediately—roads, cars, signs, and scenery.

Product Features (What’s Included):

Wooden Road Tracks with match road name ( learning about the road name): Durable, puzzle-style pieces that can be assembled into various city layouts.

Coloured Wooden Car Fleet: A set of bright, easy-to-grip vehicles (sedans, racers, etc.) compatible with the road width.

Traffic Signage Set: Includes stop signs, traffic lights, and street markers to teach road safety.

Wooden Eco-Trees: Scenic greenery to decorate the city and create a natural landscape.
shortDescription: Inspire future engineers with this complete small-world metropolis. This set moves beyond simple tracks, offering a high-quality wooden road system, a fleet of colorful cars, and scenic elements. It is the perfect open-ended STEM toy for developing spatial awareness, traffic safety knowledge, and imaginative storytelling.

name: Montessori Math & Number Tracing Tray Set
description:
ransform abstract math concepts into concrete understanding with the Montessori Math & Number Tracing Tray Set. Designed for hands-on learners, this kit uses the Montessori approach to help children visualize numbers and quantities before they ever put a pencil to paper.

By placing the vibrant wooden balls into the recessed trays, children physically “build” numbers, reinforcing counting skills and one-to-one correspondence. The grooved wooden boards also serve as finger-tracing guides, building muscle memory for writing numerals.

Why It’s a Playroom Essential:

  • Tactile Numeracy: Physically handling the balls helps bridge the gap between counting and understanding quantity.

  • Pre-Writing Skills: Tracing the grooves improves finger dexterity and prepares the hand for writing.

  • Visual Order: The tray creates a neat, organized workspace that helps children focus on the task at hand without distraction.

 

Product Features (What’s Included):

    • Wooden Number Trays: Individual wooden boards featuring carved grooves for tracing numbers and recessed divots for counting.

    • Wooden Sorting Balls: A generous set of multi-colored wooden spheres (Red, Blue, Green, Yellow, Orange) for counting exercises.

    • Wooden Storage Box: A sturdy, open-top wooden crate to keep the sorting balls organized and accessible.
shortDescription: Turn abstract math into a hands-on experience. This Montessori-inspired kit encourages children to physically “build” numbers using vibrant balls, bridging the gap between counting and understanding quantity. The grooved trays also double as tracing boards, building the fine motor muscle memory needed for writing numerals.

name: Bamboo Waterway & STEM Physics Run
description:
Bring the excitement of physics and the beauty of nature to your backyard with the Bamboo Waterway & STEM Physics Run. This versatile set is the ultimate tool for outdoor sensory exploration, allowing children to construct their own channels for water, sand, or rolling balls.

Made from real bamboo stems and accompanied by a rustic coconut scoop, this set connects children to the earth while teaching them about gravity, flow, and momentum. Whether they are building a cascading waterfall or a high-speed ball run, they are learning the basics of engineering through play.

Why It’s a Playroom Essential:

  • Versatile Play: Perfect for wet play (water runs), dry play (balls/marbles), or messy play (sand/rice).

  • Nature Connection: Replaces bright plastic pipes with organic bamboo and coconut textures that look beautiful in the garden.

  • Critical Thinking: Children must adjust angles and heights to make the water or balls flow correctly, fostering resilience and problem-solving

Product Features (What’s Included):

    • Bamboo Half-Pipe Channels: Real, segmented bamboo stems smoothed for safe play and optimal flow.

    • Bamboo Vertical Stands: Adjustable stands that allow children to change the height and angle of the tracks to control speed.

    • Coconut Scoops: Natural coconut shells attached to wooden handles, perfect for scooping water, sand, or sorting balls.

    • Natural Texture: Each piece retains the unique grain and texture of organic bamboo, offering a rich sensory experience.
shortDescription: Bring the excitement of physics to the backyard with this natural bamboo run. Designed for versatility, this set works as a mesmerizing water channel, a high-speed ball run, or a chute for sand and rice. It connects children with nature while teaching them the basics of gravity, flow, and structural engineering.

name: Coconut Shell Water Play Set
description:
Introducing our ‘Coconut Shell Water Play Set’, a beautifully handcrafted collection featuring the ‘Mini Coconut Shell Sand Scoop’, ‘Mini Coco Shell Water Scoop’, and ‘Coco Flower Bowls Set of 3’. Thoughtfully made from natural coconut shells and finished with coconut oil, this trio embodies sustainability, sensory exploration, and open-ended play — perfect for curious little learners.

Engaging Water and Sensory Play
Children can use the sand and water scoops to pour, scoop, and transfer water, sand, or sensory materials between the elegant Coco Flower Bowls. This activity naturally strengthens hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills, and focus. Whether your child is playing outdoors by the water table, at the beach, or in the garden, these eco-friendly tools invite imaginative play, experimentation, and discovery.

Natural and Sustainable Design
Each piece is handcrafted from repurposed coconut shells, showcasing the rich textures and earthy beauty of nature. The smooth, organic finish offers a soothing tactile experience, while the flower-shaped bowls add a touch of charm to every play session. By choosing these sustainable toys, you’re helping reduce plastic waste and nurturing an appreciation for the environment.

Versatile and Educational
Beyond water play, the Coco Flower Bowls can also be used for pretend cooking, sorting natural treasures, or even serving snacks. The scoops encourage independent exploration, allowing children to connect with nature while developing concentration and creativity.

In essence, our ‘Coconut Shell Water Play Set’ transforms ordinary play into an enriching, eco-conscious experience — blending learning, sensory fun, and sustainability in the most natural way possible.
shortDescription: Introducing our ‘Coconut Shell Water Play Set’, a beautifully handcrafted collection featuring the ‘Mini Coconut Shell Sand Scoop’, ‘Mini Coco Shell Water Scoop’, and ‘Coco Flower Bowls Set of 3’. Thoughtfully made from natural coconut shells and finished with coconut oil, this trio embodies sustainability, sensory exploration, and open-ended play — perfect for curious little learners.

name: Classic Wooden Dollhouse + Furniture
description:
Looking for a doll house that can spark your child’s imagination? Our 3-story classic wooden dollhouse + furniture is the perfect choice. Imagination plays a crucial role in children’s early learning, opening the door for children to explore the world around them! This house is one of our favorites for imaginative play, and your boys and girls will absolutely adore it!

This house is an open-ended toy which provides children with the perfect opportunity to explore their imaginative skills. Imaginative play is when children enact an event or experience in their life that they have come across or found interesting. It allows them to create stories and explore new ideas as they connect with the world around them. Similarly open-ended play is also a kind of play that encourages children to freely express their creative thoughts and ideas. They express themselves using their words which promotes language development.

During their pretend play experiences, children come across challenges which they learn to overcome thus developing their problem-solving skills. Another important benefit of pretend play is, it helps develop your toddlers’ emotional needs as they learn to express and understand their feelings. This doll house is also great for storytelling purposes. Thus, this three-story classic wooden dollhouse provides children with endless opportunities through which they can develop their emotional, imaginative, language and creative skills.

Includes: Doll sofa set, bedroom furniture, dining and kitchen set.

Approx dimensions of product: 46.5x19x50cms. Weight: 6kgs.

Recommended age: 2+
shortDescription: Looking for a doll house that can spark your child’s imagination? Our 3-story classic wooden dollhouse + furniture is the perfect choice. Imagination plays a crucial role in children’s early learning, opening the door for children to explore the world around them! This house is one of our favorites for imaginative play, and your boys and girls will absolutely adore it!

name: Montessori Baby Tactile Skills Bundle
description:
Discover the Joy of Early Learning with the Qtoys Montessori Baby Tactile Skills Bundle

Introduce your little one to a world of discovery with the Montessori Baby Tactile Skills Bundle, a beautifully curated collection that includes the Montessori Egg, Ball & Cup Set, Vertical Ring Stacker, and Single Shape Puzzle Set of 4. Thoughtfully designed for babies and toddlers, this set encourages hands-on exploration, fine motor development, and early cognitive growth—all while inspiring curiosity and joy through play.

Engaging Learning Through Play

The Montessori Egg, Ball & Cup Set introduces toddlers to problem-solving through tactile discovery. As children place the egg, ball, and square into their matching cups, they develop hand-eye coordination, fine motor control, and spatial awareness. The rolling motion of the ball also introduces the concept of cause and effect, sparking curiosity and early scientific thinking.

Similarly, the Vertical Ring Stacker fosters independence and concentration as children learn to stack rings with precision. This activity strengthens hand movements, encourages logical thinking, and refines motor skills essential for everyday tasks like writing or dressing. Through independent exploration, children build problem-solving abilities and confidence while learning to sort, count, and understand size relationships.

Early Shape Recognition and Sensory Growth

The Single Shape Puzzle Set of 4 is ideal for introducing young learners to shapes and patterns. Each chunky wooden piece features a sturdy knob, perfect for tiny hands to grasp and maneuver. As children fit each shape into place, they enhance visual perception, memory, and shape recognition, forming the foundation for later math and literacy skills.

Safe, Sustainable, and Beautifully Crafted

Crafted from sustainably sourced timber and finished with non-toxic, chemical-free materials, the Montessori Baby Tactile Skills Bundle ensures a safe and eco-friendly play experience. Designed to be welcoming, playful, and durable, these toys encourage babies to explore, imagine, and connect with the world around them—one engaging moment at a time.
shortDescription: Discover the Joy of Early Learning with the Qtoys Montessori Baby Tactile Skills Bundle. Introduce your little one to a world of discovery with the Montessori Baby Tactile Skills Bundle, a beautifully curated collection that includes the Montessori Egg, Ball & Cup Set, Vertical Ring Stacker, and Single Shape Puzzle Set of 4. Thoughtfully designed for babies and toddlers, this set encourages hands-on exploration, fine motor development, and early cognitive growth—all while inspiring curiosity and joy through play.

name: Montessori Counting Set & Counting Rods
description:
Explore the Joy of Numbers with the Qtoys Montessori Counting Set & Counting Rods

Embark on a meaningful journey of learning and discovery with the ‘Qtoys Montessori Counting Set and Counting Rods’ —a beautifully crafted collection designed to make mathematics fun, engaging, and hands-on. Perfect for both home learning and classroom environments, these educational tools introduce children to counting, number recognition, and early arithmetic through interactive play.

Hands-On Learning That Inspires

The ‘Montessori Counting Set’ transforms traditional math lessons into a tactile adventure. As children place each peg in numerical order, they not only count but also visualize the natural progression of numbers. This multisensory approach strengthens cognitive understanding and builds confidence in mathematical thinking. Similarly, the ‘Montessori Counting Rods’ provide a creative way for children to explore addition and subtraction. By physically manipulating the rods, they can easily grasp quantity, sequence, and value—making abstract concepts tangible and enjoyable.

Educational and Developmental Benefits

Through exploration and experimentation, children develop essential problem-solving skills, fine motor coordination, and logical reasoning. These Montessori-inspired materials encourage independent learning and self-correction, allowing children to progress at their own pace while discovering the joy of mathematics. Furthermore, the use of vibrant colors and solid wooden textures keeps learners engaged and motivated, turning every counting session into an exciting experience.

Safe, Sustainable, and Built to Last

At Qtoys, safety and sustainability are at the heart of every creation. Both the ‘Counting Set and Counting Rods’ are made from plantation timber and finished with non-toxic materials, ensuring a safe and eco-friendly learning experience.

A Foundation for Lifelong Learning

In conclusion, the ‘Qtoys Montessori Counting Set and Counting Rods’ are more than just toys—they’re essential tools for early math education. They nurture curiosity, spark imagination, and build a strong foundation for lifelong learning in a fun, sustainable way.

Counting Set Approx dimensions of product: 12.5×5.5×1.5cms. Montessori Counting Rods: 33.5×32.5×2.5cms.
shortDescription:
Explore the Joy of Numbers with the Qtoys Montessori Counting Set & Counting Rods

Embark on a meaningful journey of learning and discovery with the ‘Qtoys Montessori Counting Set and Counting Rods’ —a beautifully crafted collection designed to make mathematics fun, engaging, and hands-on. Perfect for both home learning and classroom environments, these educational tools introduce children to counting, number recognition, and early arithmetic through interactive play.

name: Montessori Plants & Animals Bundle
description:
Discover the Wonders of Nature with the Qtoys Montessori Plants & Animals Bundle

Introduce children to the beauty of nature and the science of living things with the ‘Qtoys Montessori Plants & Animals Bundle’. Thoughtfully designed to inspire curiosity and hands-on learning, this collection includes beautifully handcrafted wooden puzzles that teach children about plant parts and animal anatomy in an engaging, interactive way.

Learn Through Play

The ‘Montessori Plants Bundle’ helps young learners explore the essential parts of plants through removable pieces that make learning tactile and fun. Similarly, the ‘Montessori Animals Bundle’—featuring the Horse, Bird, and Fish puzzles—invites children to discover the fascinating anatomy of animals. As they lift and place each piece, children gain a deeper understanding of how plants and animals function in nature while developing concentration, logical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

Educational and Developmental Benefits:

Both bundles are designed with Montessori principles in mind, promoting self-directed learning and exploration. The sturdy knobs on each puzzle piece make it easy for small hands to grasp, enhancing fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Additionally, the clear labeling of each part introduces children to early science vocabulary, supporting both language and cognitive development. Transitioning naturally from play to learning, these puzzles encourage curiosity about how living things grow and interact with their environment.

Sustainable and Safe Design

Crafted from sustainably sourced wood and finished with non-toxic, child-safe materials, the ‘Montessori Plants & Animals Bundle’ reflects Qtoys’ commitment to eco-friendly craftsmanship. Durable and beautifully illustrated, these puzzles offer an enriching learning experience while caring for the planet.

Inspire a Love for Nature

Perfect for home learning or classroom use, the Qtoys ‘Montessori Plants & Animals Bundle’ makes an excellent educational gift. Encourage your child to explore, discover, and appreciate the natural world—one puzzle piece at a time.
shortDescription:
Discover the Wonders of Nature with the Qtoys Montessori Plants & Animals Bundle

Introduce children to the beauty of nature and the science of living things with the ‘Qtoys Montessori Plants & Animals Bundle’. Thoughtfully designed to inspire curiosity and hands-on learning, this collection includes beautifully handcrafted wooden puzzles that teach children about plant parts and animal anatomy in an engaging, interactive way.

name: Montessori Plants Bundle
description:
Introduce children to the wonders of nature with the Qtoys Montessori Plants Bundle. These wooden educational puzzles are designed to teach children about the main parts plants in a simple and interactive way. With removable pieces, little learners can explore the different parts while enjoying hands-on play.

Crafted from sustainable wood and finished with non-toxic materials, these puzzles are safe, eco-friendly, and durable. The sturdy knobs on each piece make it easy for small hands to grip and place the parts back in their correct positions. This helps children develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving abilities while learning about botany.

More than just a puzzle, these Montessori-inspired puzzles are a learning resource. It introduces children to early science concepts, encouraging curiosity about how plants grow and why each part is important. Parents and educators can use the puzzle as a teaching aid, making it easier to explain the role of each part in a plant’s life cycle.

In addition, the puzzles promote language development. Children learn new words, practice identifying each part, and improve memory through repetition. The bright, realistic illustrations make learning fun and engaging.

At Qtoys, we believe that play should be both enjoyable and educational. These puzzles combine eco-conscious craftsmanship with Montessori principles, offering puzzles that inspires discovery while caring for the environment.

Perfect for home learning or classroom use, the ‘Montessori Plants Bundle’ make an excellent gift for children who love nature and hands-on learning.

name: Montessori Animals Bundle
description:
Our Montessori Animals Bundle Set is a hands-on learning tool for animal anatomy.

Introduce your child to the fascinating world of animals with our Montessori Horse, Bird and Fish Puzzle. These beautifully designed wooden puzzles are crafted from sustainably sourced wood and painted with child-safe, non-toxic finishes. Featuring removable parts—these puzzles offer a hands-on way for children to explore animal anatomy while developing essential early learning skills.

Designed with young learners in mind, each puzzle piece includes an easy-to-grasp wooden knob that encourages fine motor development and hand-eye coordination. As children lift and place each part, they engage in active problem-solving, enhance their visual perception, and improve their concentration.

What makes this puzzle unique is its Montessori-inspired design. It fosters self-directed learning and independent exploration, allowing children to learn at their own pace. The clear labeling of each body part helps introduce early science vocabulary and supports literacy development, making these puzzles an ideal resource for both home learning and classroom use.

Furthermore, the simple act of assembling these animal puzzles teaches children patience and encourages them to think logically as they determine where each piece belongs. The realistic illustration  also supports nature education and builds an early connection to animals and farming life.

Whether your child is passionate about animals or just beginning to explore the world around them, the Montessori Animals Bundle is a wonderful addition to their educational toy collection.

Perfect for toddlers and preschoolers, these puzzles combine fun and learning in a meaningful way.

Horse: Approx dimensions: 21.5x19x3.5cms. Bird: Approx dimensions: 21.5x19x3.5cms. Fish: Approx dimensions: 22.5x22x3.2cms.

name: Montessori Spatial Logic Kit
description:
Explore Shapes, Sizes, and Numbers with Qtoys’ Montessori Shapes Puzzle Bundle!

At Qtoys, we believe that learning should be engaging, hands-on, and environmentally conscious. Our ‘Giant Shape Knob Puzzle’ and ‘Counting Stair’ are designed to spark curiosity and creativity in young learners while nurturing essential developmental skills through play.

-Interactive Learning and Exploration

The ‘Giant Shape Knob Puzzle’ invites children into a world of discovery as they explore different shapes and sizes. With large, sturdy pieces (each measuring 6 x 6 cm) and tactile knobs, little hands can easily grasp and maneuver each shape. This promotes fine motor development, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving skills. Similarly, the ‘Counting Stair’ transforms early math learning into an exciting experience. Children match wooden shapes along the stair to understand numbers, counting, and sequencing—turning abstract concepts into tangible fun.

-Cognitive and Developmental Benefits

Both toys foster cognitive growth and foundational learning. As children manipulate the pieces of the ‘Shape Puzzle’, they improve spatial awareness and logical thinking. Meanwhile, the ‘Counting Stair’ enhances number recognition and strengthens concentration. These open-ended learning tools help children transition naturally from play to learning, encouraging independence and confidence in their abilities.

-Safe, Sustainable, and Thoughtfully Designed

Crafted from plantation timber and finished with non-toxic paints, both products reflect Qtoys’ commitment to sustainability and child safety. Parents can feel confident knowing their children are playing with eco-friendly toys made to the highest quality standards.

-Inspire a Lifetime of Learning

In conclusion, the ‘Giant Shape Knob Puzzle and Counting Stair’ are perfect for developing cognitive, motor, and mathematical skills while ensuring hours of joyful play. Bring these beautifully handcrafted educational tools home and watch your child’s understanding of shapes, sizes, and numbers grow—one playful moment at a time.

Counting stair: Approx dimensions of product: 31x14x8cms. Giant Shape Knob Puzzle: Approx dimensions:40x9x3cms.
shortDescription:

At Qtoys, we believe that learning should be engaging, hands-on, and environmentally conscious. Our ‘Giant Shape Knob Puzzle’ and ‘Counting Stair’ are designed to spark curiosity and creativity in young learners while nurturing essential developmental skills through play.

name: The foundation Literacy and Math Kit
description:
Discover the Essentials: Natural Capital Letter & Number Puzzle Bundle!
Are you looking for the perfect foundational tool to introduce your child to the building blocks of language and math? Our curated ‘Natural Capital Letter and Number Puzzle’ Bundle is the ideal solution!

This engaging, hands-on set is designed to kickstart your young learner’s journey into literacy and numeracy through tactile play.

Key Learning & Developmental Benefits
-Foster Foundational Skills:

Capital Letter Puzzle: Children can easily familiarize themselves with the uppercase alphabet. By handling and placing each piece, they begin to identify letters and lay the groundwork for reading readiness.

Number Puzzle: Introduce your child to numerical concepts as they learn to recognize and sequence numbers. This hands-on approach builds crucial early numeracy skills for mathematical understanding.

-Enhance Physical & Cognitive Growth:

Fine Motor Skills: Manipulating the thick, natural puzzle pieces helps enhance hand-eye coordination and dexterity—skills vital for future writing and drawing.

Problem-Solving: As children actively match and fit the pieces into their correct spots, they exercise logical reasoning and critical thinking.

Concentration: Puzzles are a fantastic way to encourage focus, persistence, and patience in young minds.

Elevate your child’s learning experience with this captivating, high-quality bundle. It’s the perfect educational resource to inspire curiosity and ignite a passion for learning!

Recommended Age: 2+

name: Tidy Play Sorting System
description:
The Natural Bamboo Sorting Container Set are versatile tools for creative and educational play. Crafted from eco-friendly bamboo, this set of sorting trays is not only durable but also lightweight, making it ideal for young learners. With a sleek, minimalist design, these containers are perfect for organizing, sorting and learning activities at home or in a classroom setting. The containers with the tongs and bowling counters together are a perfect activity to keep little ones engaged.

One of their uses is for colour sorting activities, where children can group the bowling counters into the containers based on colour. This activity enhances cognitive development and teaches foundational skills such as classification and organization. Furthermore, these bamboo trays can also be used for counting activities, helping kids understand numbers and quantities in a hands-on way.

In addition to educational benefits, these containers are great for storing small art accessories like crayons, and small stickers. Their natural bamboo finish adds a touch of elegance to any playroom or craft area while keeping everything neatly organized.

The ‘Natural Bamboo Sorting Containers’ align with Montessori principles, promoting independent and open-ended play. They encourage children to engage in problem-solving and fine motor skill development while exploring their creativity. The smooth edges and sturdy construction ensure safety during playtime, making them suitable for toddlers and young children.

Moreover, these sorting containers are environmentally friendly, made from sustainably sourced bamboo, which contributes to an eco-conscious lifestyle. Their timeless design complements any educational or play environment, making them an essential addition to your child’s learning journey.

In summary, the ‘Natural Bamboo Sorting Container Set’ are more than storage—they’re tools for interactive, eco-friendly learning. Add them to your collection today and let your child explore, organize and learn through play!

This listing includes the bamboo containers + tongs + bowling counters.

Approx dimensions: Each tray: 12x9x4.5cms.

name: Classic Wooden Bed + Spa Set
description:
Spark Joy and Development: The Ultimate Imaginative Play Bundle
Firstly, ignite your child’s imagination with our newest additions: the Classic Wooden Bed and the Pamper and Play Spa Set. Together, these toys create a perfect setting for rich, imaginative adventures that are vital for childhood development.

The Classic Wooden Bed, beautifully crafted from high-quality wood, is designed to be a whimsical retreat for beloved dolls. As children use it, they are invited to embark on captivating adventures and endless storytelling. Furthermore, our delightful Pamper and Play Spa Set features all the essentials for a luxurious make-believe spa experience, including pretend shampoo, bath gel, hand wash, face cleanser, and soap.

Imaginative play is far more than just fun. For instance, engaging in these scenarios helps children exercise their problem-solving skills and cultivate creativity. Moreover, as they take on roles—whether as the hero of a story with their doll or the host of a spa day—they develop a deeper understanding of themselves and the world.

In addition, the benefits of this kind of role-play extend deeply into social and emotional growth. Through these interactive scenarios, children learn to empathize with others, communicate effectively, and collaborate with their peers. Specifically, the spa set encourages them to explore concepts of relaxation and care, while the rocker provides a backdrop for dramatic play.

Ultimately, both the wooden bed and the spa set provide the perfect backdrop for these developmental adventures, improving the child’s cognitive skills and encouraging emotional intelligence. Therefore, elevate your child’s play experience with this bundle that sparks joy, fosters creativity, and nurtures holistic development.

Approx dimensions of bed:36.5×20.5×20.5cms. Weight: 1.7kgs.

name: Eco Doll house + Furniture Set
description:
Discover the Eco Doll house

Unleash Imagination and Creativity

Are you in search of a toy house that ignites your child’s imagination? Look no further than our enchanting Eco Doll house + Furniture Set. Crafted from recycled rubberwood, this dollhouse is not just a toy—it’s a gateway to a world of endless possibilities. With its DIY design, children can assemble the house themselves, fostering a sense of accomplishment and pride. No tools required—just pure, imaginative fun.

Promoting Fine Motor Skills and Construction

Ideal for curious builders, our Eco Doll house is the perfect construction set. As children piece together the house, they develop essential fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Through hands-on construction, they learn the basics of assembly and problem-solving, setting the stage for future building endeavors.

Encouraging Imaginative Play

Open-ended toys like our Eco Dollhouse offer children the freedom to explore their creativity and imagination. Through imaginative play, they enact real-life scenarios, weave captivating stories, and delve into new ideas. This type of play not only entertains but also nurtures language development and communication skills, laying a strong foundation for expressive storytelling.

Unlocking Endless Possibilities

During pretend play, children encounter challenges that foster resilience and emotional growth. They learn to navigate complex emotions, express themselves, and develop empathy—a vital skill for social interaction. Our dollhouse serves as a platform for storytelling, providing endless opportunities for children to develop their emotional intelligence, imaginative prowess, and creative expression.

Product Specifications:

  • Dimensions: L60xW25xH75cms
  • Weight: 8kgs

Embark on a journey of creativity and discovery with our Eco Dollhouse. With its eco-friendly design and endless play possibilities, it’s more than just a toy—it’s a doorway to a world of imagination and wonder. Recommended for ages 3 and up, this dollhouse promises hours of joy and exploration for your child.

Includes furniture that you can see in the images.
shortDescription: Looking for a toy house that can spark your childs imagination? Our gorgeous doll house + furniture set is the perfect choice. The set is a DIY design which allows children to fix the house together as a construction activity. No tools required. All of our recycled tree branch doll furniture will fit nicely in this eco dollhouse. This doll house comes with the ladder as per photo.

name: The Grand Calculation Station
description:
Introducing our beautiful ‘Jumbo Counting Trays + Wooden Balls’– this set is an essential tool for enhancing children’s numeracy development. These trays are meticulously designed to provide toddlers with a fun and interactive way to learn counting and number recognition. Made from premium Australian Timber, these counting trays offer durability and a natural aesthetic that fits perfectly into any learning environment.

Our Counting Trays feature numbers from 0 to 9, each tray thoughtfully crafted to facilitate various learning activities. The product comes in a sturdy wooden box, ensuring easy storage and organization. With this versatile set, children can engage in numerous educational activities that make learning numbers enjoyable and effective.

One of the primary uses of these counting trays is for writing and tracing numbers. By filling the trays with sand, children can trace the numbers with their fingers or a stylus, enhancing their fine motor skills and reinforcing number formation. This tactile experience helps solidify their understanding of each number’s shape and structure.

In addition to sand tracing, the Jumbo Counting Trays can be used with different materials for counting exercises. Children can place small objects such as beads, pebbles, or buttons into the trays, matching the quantity with the number represented. This hands-on approach not only reinforces counting skills but also introduces basic concepts of addition and subtraction as children manipulate the materials.

Furthermore, the counting trays are perfect for creative play with play dough. Children can roll out the dough and press it into the trays, creating fun, tactile representations of each number. The ‘Jumbo Counting Trays + Wooden Balls’ combines sensory play with numeracy, making learning both enjoyable and memorable.

Each tile measures: 20x12x1.5cms. Tray/wooden box: 22x17x12cms.
shortDescription: Introducing our beautiful ‘Jumbo Counting Trays + Wooden Balls’– this set is an essential tool for enhancing children’s numeracy development. These trays are meticulously designed to provide toddlers with a fun and interactive way to learn counting and number recognition. Made from premium Australian Timber, these counting trays offer durability and a natural aesthetic that fits perfectly into any learning environment.

name: The Creative logic sorting Suite ( wooden balls included)
description:
Our ‘Coloured Nesting and Stacking bowls’ + Wooden Balls, offer multifunctional fun and learning for children. This exciting set provides endless possibilities for play and development. Children can use these bowls for sorting experiences, organizing items by colour, size, or type, enhancing their categorization skills. Additionally, the bowls can be stacked in two different ways: one on top of the other to build a tower or nested inside each other, creating a compact and satisfying arrangement.

Using these bowls for colour matching activities with the wooden balls further enriches the play experience. Children can engage in these activities to improve their colour recognition, essential for developing literacy and numeracy skills. As they attempt to stack the bowls, they actively promote their cognitive skills, including problem-solving, spatial awareness, and hand-eye coordination.

Made from high-quality, durable materials, our Coloured Nesting and Stacking bowls withstand active play while providing a safe experience for young hands. The smooth edges and vibrant colors attract children, encouraging them to explore and learn. Ideal for both independent play and collaborative activities, these bowls support a child’s growth and development in an engaging and interactive way.

Whether children use the bowls for imaginative play, sorting, stacking, or color matching, they enjoy a valuable addition to their educational toys. The opportunities with these bowls truly feel endless, fostering creativity, learning, and fun.

Measures 15 x 15cm nesting inside one another. Stacked measures approx 17cms.

name: 4 in 1 Activity Table + Chair
description:
The ‘4 in 1 Activity Table + Chair’ isn’t just a piece of furniture—it’s a gateway to a world of imagination and discovery! Designed with versatility and functionality in mind, this table seamlessly transitions between mealtime, playtime, and learning activities, making it an essential addition to any home.

Mealtime becomes a breeze as children eagerly gather around the table, eager to enjoy their favourite snack. But the fun doesn’t stop there! With two removable trays that double as activity setups, children can dive into a world of creativity and exploration. Whether they’re drawing, coloring, building, or crafting, the possibilities are endless. And when it’s time to clean up or take the fun on the go, simply pop out the trays and let the adventures continue!

But wait, there’s more! The innovative design of the 4 in 1 Activity Table includes lids that serve as both a whiteboard and a magnetic chalkboard, providing yet another avenue for imaginative play. From doodling and writing to playing games and solving puzzles, children can unleash their creativity and express themselves in new and exciting ways.

With its durable construction and child-friendly design, the 4-in-1 Activity Table is built to withstand the rigors of daily use, ensuring years of enjoyment for your little ones. Whether it’s a rainy day indoors or a sunny afternoon in the backyard, this table promises endless hours of excitement and exploration for children of all ages.

*Magnetic board holds light magnets.

Approx dimensions of table: 84x45x50cms. Approx dimensions: Chair – 32x30x45cm (Chair surface is 25cm high). Chair seat to the floor is 25cms.

name: Toddler Perspex Easel + Paint Pot Holder
description:
Our toddler perspex easel is the perfect double-sided standing easel so two children can enjoy painting together. It is perfect for preschool and kindergartens and can easily be wiped off and reused. It is ideal for those budding artists to explore their creative skills. Our paint pot holder is perfect for painting or arts and crafts. It includes the glass jars with the holder.

Arts and crafts is a wholesome experience for children which offers them endless opportunities to explore their talent and improve their skills as they achieve developmental milestones. It is suitable for all age groups, and it also provides children with opportunities to explore their creativity. For children, arts and crafts play an enormous role in their development. Art activities can aid in promoting their fine and gross motor skills. Art experiences not only promotes social skills, but it also encourages children to work collaboratively and talk about their art which promotes their literacy. As children freely express themselves through their art, they are making decisions about what they are creating which helps them in decision making in all aspects of life.

Art also improves children’s’ focus and attention span as children engage in various art and craft experiences. It also teaches them patience as children explore their creative side. Art activities also promote hand eye coordination which is the ability to process information as children coordinate their movements to complete tasks. There fore the toddler Perspex Easel + Paint Pot Holder is a perfect addition to any setting.

Made from Premium Australian Timber.

Product will slightly differ from images due to change to Australian Timber.

Approx dimensions of easel: 100x50x5cms. Weight: 8.2kgs. Approx dimensions of paint pot holder: 45x10x10cms.

Recommended age: 2+

It is perfect for preschool and kindergartens and can easily be wiped off and reused. It is ideal for those budding artists to explore their creative skills. Our paint pot holder is perfect for painting or arts and crafts. It includes the glass jars with the holder.

name: 4 in 1 table Easel + Paint Pot Holder
description:
Investing in quality art supplies is a brilliant way to encourage your child’s development. Firstly, our versatile 4-in-1 Table Easel, crafted from premium Australian timber, offers an incredible foundation for endless creative play. Specifically, it features four distinct, inspiring surfaces. On one side, there is a magnetic whiteboard for drawing and magnetic activities. Flip it over, and you’ll find a magnetic chalkboard, perfect for chalk drawings and enhancing early literacy skills. Furthermore, the unique acrylic insert allows your children to explore water-based paints safely, providing a mess-free painting experience. Therefore, this easel gives children plenty of options to express themselves creatively, from using chalk and magnets to paint.

To complement this experience, our Wooden Paint Pot Holder is the perfect arts and crafts accessory. Designed for convenience, this holder is made of wood and includes glass jars with lids, ensuring an organized and efficient setup. Critically, the holder’s design securely keeps paint pots off the table surface, significantly reducing the risk of spills and making cleanup easy.

Arts and crafts provide a wholesome and essential experience for children, offering endless opportunities to explore their talent and reach important developmental milestones. For instance, engaging in art activities is crucial for promoting fine and gross motor skills. In addition, when children work together on projects and discuss their creations, their social skills and literacy naturally improve. Moreover, by freely expressing themselves through art, they are constantly making decisions, which sharpens their decision-making skills in all aspects of life.

Ultimately, art also helps to improve a child’s focus and attention span and teaches patience as they coordinate their movements, thereby promoting hand-eye coordination. Hence, the QToys 4-in-1 Table Painting Easel, combined with our functional Paint Pot Holder, is the good choice for every young artist looking to explore, learn, and grow.

name: Square Cake Fraction
description:
Square Cake Fraction Set – Learning Fractions Through Play

The ‘Square Cake Fraction Set’ is a delightful hands-on resource that combines fun, creativity, and learning in one engaging toy. Designed to look like a beautiful layered cake, this educational toy can be divided into fractions, making it a perfect tool for introducing mathematical concepts in a simple and enjoyable way. Children can explore fractions, shapes, and problem-solving while also engaging in imaginative role play. It also includes an activity guide that gives you ideas for learning through play.

To begin with, the top layer of the cake features 16 equal pieces that form a complete square This layer is an excellent way to demonstrate how smaller parts make up a whole. As children explore the different layers, they will find that each one is divided into various fractions. This gradual progression allows them to understand halves, thirds, quarters, and more while building confidence in their math skills.

Moreover, the ‘Square Cake Fraction Set’ is not just about learning numbers. Because each piece can be rearranged, children can also use the parts to design unique patterns and creations. For example, they can transform the fractions into imaginative objects, such as flowers, wheels, or geometric shapes. As a result, the toy encourages both mathematical thinking and open-ended creativity.

In addition, this fraction cake is ideal for group play. Children can share, compare pieces, and communicate their ideas, which naturally supports the development of social and language skills. Whether used at home, in classrooms, or during play dates, it provides countless opportunities for collaborative learning.

Approx dimensions: 21x21x7.5cms. Weight: 1.6kgs.

Ideal for preschoolers, this puzzle not only teaches children about their bodies and environment but also fosters emotional intelligence and language development. The Qtoys Five Senses Puzzle and Book Set is a meaningful educational gift that makes learning both fun and memorable.

description:

Introduce your child to the wonders of the ocean with the Qtoys wooden Fish Puzzle. Designed with seven removable pieces, this puzzle highlights the head, body, pectoral fin, dorsal fin, pelvic fin, anal fin, and tail, giving children a hands-on way to explore the anatomy of a fish.

Crafted from sustainable, eco-friendly wood and finished with non-toxic materials, this educational puzzle is not only safe for little hands but also environmentally conscious. Because each piece includes an easy-to-grip knob, even toddlers can enjoy independent play while improving their fine motor skills.

In addition, the puzzle provides an excellent introduction to marine biology concepts. By piecing together the clownfish, children begin to understand how different body parts work together, making early learning both fun and meaningful. Moreover, as they practice identifying shapes and positions, kids enhance their problem-solving abilities and hand-eye coordination.

What truly sets this puzzle apart is its ability to promote open-ended play. Children can use the fish puzzle as part of a larger ocean-themed learning activity, combining it with story time, sensory play, or role-playing adventures. As a result, this simple yet engaging toy becomes a versatile educational resource that grows with your child.

Furthermore, the Qtoys Montessori Fish Puzzle makes an excellent gift for toddlers and preschoolers. Whether you are a parent, educator, or caregiver, this puzzle is the perfect way to combine playtime with purposeful learning.

Bring the gift of growth into your child’s playroom today with the Qtoys Fish Puzzle—where eco-friendly design, educational value, and imaginative fun come together.

name: Montessori Parts of a Plant Puzzle
description:
Introduce children to the wonders of nature with the Qtoys Montessori Parts of a Plant Puzzle. This wooden educational puzzle is designed to teach children about the main parts of a plant in a simple and interactive way. With removable pieces, little learners can explore the flower, leaf, stem, bud and roots while enjoying hands-on play.

Crafted from sustainable wood and finished with non-toxic materials, this puzzle is safe, eco-friendly, and durable. The sturdy knobs on each piece make it easy for small hands to grip and place the parts back in their correct positions. This helps children develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving abilities while learning about botany.

More than just a puzzle, this Montessori-inspired puzzle is a learning resource. It introduces children to early science concepts, encouraging curiosity about how plants grow and why each part of a plant is important. Parents and educators can use the puzzle as a teaching aid, making it easier to explain the role of each part in a plant’s life cycle.

In addition, the ‘Parts of a Plant Puzzle’ promotes language development. Children learn new words, practice identifying each part, and improve memory through repetition. The bright, realistic illustrations make learning fun and engaging.

At Qtoys, we believe that play should be both enjoyable and educational. This puzzle combines eco-conscious craftsmanship with Montessori principles, offering a puzzle that inspires discovery while caring for the environment.

Perfect for home learning or classroom use, the ‘Montessori Parts of a Plant Puzzle’ makes an excellent gift for children who love nature and hands-on learning.

name: Montessori Land and Water Forms
description:
Introducing the Montessori Land and Water Forms . This is a hands-on geography resource designed to spark curiosity and deepen understanding of the natural world.  It is perfect for classrooms, homeschooling, or curious young explorers. This beautifully crafted wooden set introduces children to essential geographical terms and shapes in an engaging, tactile way.

Each set includes six wooden tiles representing key land and water forms – bay, cape, gulf, strait, peninsula and isthmus – along with matching labeled cards. The contrasting green “land” and natural wood “water” areas visually demonstrate how these features appear in nature, making abstract concepts easier for children to grasp.

Moreover, the Montessori Land and Water Forms are crafted from sustainably sourced wood and finished with child-safe, non-toxic paint. This ensures safe and eco-friendly learning. The smooth, durable pieces are designed for little hands to explore repeatedly. This supports long-term use both at home and in educational settings.

In addition, this set aligns perfectly with Montessori principles, encouraging independent exploration, self-directed learning, and sensory discovery. Children can match the wooden forms with the corresponding cards, practice naming each feature, and even expand the activity by finding real-life examples on maps or globes.

Not only does this toy teach geography, but it also promotes language development, critical thinking and observation skills. By using a hands-on approach, children retain information more effectively, making learning meaningful and fun.

🌟 Key Benefits of Montessori Land and Water Forms:
Introduces fundamental geography concepts
Enhances vocabulary and language development
Encourages independent, hands-on learning
Eco-friendly and made with safe materials

Bring the world into your child’s hands with Montessori Land and Water Forms – a timeless educational tool that transforms geography into an exciting adventure of discovery!

name: Counting Bundle
description:
Our Counting Bundle is an exceptional educational resource designed to foster a love for mathematics in children.

The set comprises of twenty wooden pieces, including the wooden boards labelled with numbers 1 through 10, corresponding wooden balls to fit into each board, and wooden numbers from 0 to 9.

As children place the wooden balls onto the boards, they not only practice counting but also refine their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Additionally, this tactile engagement enhances their understanding of numerical concepts while simultaneously promoting physical dexterity.

Moreover, the act of identifying and counting numbers contributes to the development of numeracy skills and lays a solid foundation for language acquisition. What’s more is that through hands-on interaction with the counting bundle, children naturally absorb mathematical concepts, making learning an enjoyable and intuitive process.

We ensure ethical sourcing and fair-trade practices in crafting all QToys products, including our Counting Bundle, using environmentally friendly materials and maintaining ethical working conditions.

Please note that although the colours of the wooden balls may vary, we carefully select each component to meet our quality standards. The approximate dimensions of the boards are 13x9x15cms, with a weight of 0.6kgs, making it convenient for young learners to handle.

Recommended for children aged 2 and above.

For more information, visit our socials:

Youtube channel
Follow Us on Instagram
Follow Us on Facebook
shortDescription:
Looking for an educational learning set to boost your child’s numeracy skills? This counting and math’s set is a terrific tool for children to learn simple mathematics. It includes one set of the wooden boards from numbers 1-10 along with the small wooden balls that fit into each wooden board. It also includes wooden numbers from 0-9. The set includes 20 numbers. name: Kookaburra Knob Puzzle
description:

Bring the sights and sounds of the bush into your child’s world with our Montessori Kookaburra Knob Puzzle. This wooden puzzle is a fun and educational way to introduce one of Australia’s most iconic birds. It is made from sustainably sourced wood and painted with child-safe, non-toxic colours.

The puzzle features six removable parts—head, wing, body, first leg, second leg, and tail. Each piece has a smooth wooden knob, making it easy for little hands to hold. This promotes fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and spatial awareness.

Inspired by Montessori principles, the puzzle encourages independent play. Children learn at their own pace by exploring shapes and positions. It also supports early science learning with clearly labelled parts. This builds vocabulary and boosts literacy in a fun, hands-on way.

The vibrant kookaburra design brings a touch of nature into any learning space. It also helps foster a love for Australian wildlife. This makes the puzzle perfect for home learning, classrooms, or childcare settings focused on nature and ecology.

As children complete the puzzle, they develop concentration and logical thinking. They also practice problem-solving and visual perception. These are important early learning skills.

The Montessori Kookaburra Knob Puzzle is ideal for toddlers and preschoolers. It blends learning with play in a meaningful and engaging way.

If your child enjoys nature and animals, this puzzle is a great choice. Be sure to explore our full range of Montessori puzzles and wooden learning toys designed to grow with your child.

description:

Introduce your child to the vibrant world of Australia’s natural treasures with our Australian Native Fruit Puzzle. Made from high-quality, sustainably sourced rubber wood, this beautifully crafted puzzle features eight native Australian fruits, each with an easy-to-grasp wooden knob. Designed specifically for little hands, this puzzle promotes early learning through play while celebrating the unique flora of our land.

As children lift and fit each piece, they are developing essential fine motor skills and improving their hand-eye coordination. With each attempt to match a fruit to its correct place, they are also building their problem-solving skills and visual perception. Additionally, learning the names and colours of native fruits boosts early literacy skills and colour recognition, making this an excellent multi-sensory learning tool.

Moreover, puzzles like this encourage children to practice patience and concentration, both crucial skills for early development. The act of trial and error involved in completing the puzzle strengthens logical reasoning and improves memory as children recall shapes and positions.

What sets this puzzle apart is its cultural and educational value. Introducing Australian native fruits not only sparks curiosity but also connects children to local biodiversity in a meaningful way. This makes the Australian Native Fruit Puzzle an ideal addition to classrooms, playrooms, and early learning centres.

Whether your little one is learning at home or in a group setting, this puzzle offers hours of educational fun. It’s a simple yet powerful way to nurture cognitive growth, critical thinking, and a love for nature.

If your child enjoys the Australian Native Fruit Puzzle, be sure to explore our full range of educational puzzles and games designed to inspire learning through play.

name: The Sensory Writing and sorting station
description:
Montessori Sand Tray + Assorted Tray Inserts – A Complete Sensory and Educational Play Set

Unlock the full potential of sensory play and early learning with the Montessori Sand Tray and Assorted Tray Inserts, a dynamic duo designed to inspire creativity, build fine motor skills, and promote hands-on discovery.

To begin with, the sand tray provides a sturdy, tactile foundation for sensory exploration using sand, rice, or other natural materials. Younger children will enjoy the sensory stimulation and texture play, while older children can practice writing, drawing, or forming letters and numbers in the tray – making it a valuable tool for both early childhood development and school readiness.

What truly elevates this experience is the inclusion of the assorted inserts, specially designed to fit perfectly with the Sand Tray. These inserts offer a wide variety of educational activities, including sorting, matching, lacing and tracing. Each insert features thoughtfully designed cutouts that allow children to engage in pre-writing exercises, improve hand-eye coordination, and strengthen fine motor skills in a fun and interactive way.

Crafted from durable, child-safe materials, this set is made to last and easy to clean which makes it perfect for daily use in both home and classroom environments.

In conclusion, this set is more than just a toy—it’s a multi-functional, eco-friendly learning resource that grows with your child. Support their developmental journey with a play set that makes learning meaningful, engaging, and fun.

A must-have for every mindful playroom!

name: Montessori Sand Tray + Peg Tray Insert
description:
Montessori Sand Tray with Peg Tray Insert: Hands-On Learning for Focused Play

Introduce a new dimension of purposeful play with the Montessori Sand Tray and Peg Tray Insert—a thoughtfully designed combination that enhances concentration, fine motor development, and early cognitive skills through interactive, hands-on learning.

Carefully engineered to fit seamlessly over the Sand Tray (SKU 828), the Peg Tray transforms this sensory tool into a focused educational resource. While the base tray offers opportunities for tactile exploration using sand, rice, or grains, the peg insert encourages children to engage in precise movements that foster developmental growth.

This insert features colorful wooden pegs that promote the development of pincer grasp, finger strength, and bilateral coordination—key motor skills needed for writing and self-care tasks. As children insert and remove pegs, they also explore pattern recognition, color sorting, and early counting, making this toy ideal for supporting foundational math and logic skills.

Crafted from sustainably sourced timber, the tray and insert are built to last, with a smooth, safe finish suitable for children aged 3 and up.

Whether used in the home, in an early learning environment, or during therapy sessions, the Sand Tray with Peg Tray offers endless educational benefits. Its versatility supports both structured activities and open-ended exploration, catering to various learning styles and developmental needs.

Encourage focused play, sharpen fine motor skills, and support your child’s learning journey with this engaging, eco-friendly toy. The sand tray with peg tray insert is more than just a play tool—it’s an investment in meaningful, skill-building fun.

name: Counting Rabbit
description:
Counting Rabbit Set – A Colourful Journey Through Numbers and Play.

Make early math learning a joyful adventure with the Counting Rabbit Set. This set is a delightful wooden toy designed to teach counting, colour recognition, and number sequencing. Crafted with vibrant, eco-friendly materials, this educational toy brings numbers to life through adorable rabbit and carrot characters.

To start, children are introduced to numbers 1 through 10 with ten beautifully painted wooden rabbits in a rainbow of colours with the carrots. Each rabbit is numbered and fits perfectly into the wooden base. This helps children visually and physically connect numbers. As a result, little learners quickly begin to grasp the concept of counting and numerical progression in a hands-on way.

Moreover, this set features two carrot-shaped pieces marked with numbers 9 and 10. This adds a playful and thematic twist that captures children’s imagination. Whether children are counting the numbers or engaging in imaginative bunny adventures, the learning possibilities are endless.

In addition, the Counting Rabbit Set enhances essential early childhood skills such as fine motor development, hand-eye coordination, and colour recognition. Its open-ended design also encourages storytelling and pretend play, making it a versatile addition to any playroom or classroom.

Importantly, the set is made using sustainably sourced wood and non-toxic paints, making it a safe and planet-friendly choice for parents and educators alike. It’s also compact and easy to store, making it perfect for home learning environments or on-the-go activities.

In conclusion, the ‘Counting Rabbit Set’ is more than just a toy – it’s an engaging educational tool that turns early math into a fun and interactive experience. This set is a must-have for nurturing foundational number skills in a playful and memorable way.

Hop into learning with a toy that counts – literally!
