name: The Water Cycle Story and Play Set
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]The Water Cycle Story and Play Set – Learn Through Storytelling and Hands-On Play.

Introduce children to the wonders of nature with ‘The Water Cycle Story and Play Set’ – a beautifully designed educational toy that combines storytelling, puzzles, and interactive learning. This engaging set makes understanding the water cycle fun, visual, and meaningful for young minds.

To begin with, the play set includes a vibrant wooden puzzle that illustrates the complete water cycle – from rain and rivers to evaporation and clouds. Each piece fits perfectly into a sturdy wooden tray, making it easy for children to assemble while learning about the natural world around them.

Additionally, the set includes a charming mini storybook titled “From Cloud to Sea: The Adventure of a Waterdrop.” This story introduces children to the water cycle through the eyes of a cheerful little water droplet. As they follow the droplet’s journey from sky to stream, children build an emotional connection to nature while grasping scientific concepts through the narrative.

What’s more, this play set encourages both independent and guided play. While the puzzle boosts fine motor skills and spatial awareness, the storybook fosters language development and reading comprehension. Therefore, it’s ideal for home learning, early childhood classrooms, and environmental education programs.

Furthermore, the set features eco-friendly materials and non-toxic paints, reflecting a commitment to sustainability and safety. Parents and educators can feel confident knowing that this product supports both child development and planet-friendly values.

In conclusion, ‘The Water Cycle Story and Play Set’ is an excellent resource for introducing STEAM concepts in an age-appropriate and delightful way. Whether you’re teaching about nature, science, or storytelling, this set provides a playful foundation for meaningful learning.

Perfect for curious little learners aged 3+, this set is where storytelling meets science – one droplet at a time.

name: Saigon Tongue Drum
description:
Saigon Tongue Drum – Discover the Rhythm of Nature

The Saigon Tongue Drum by QToys is a beautifully handcrafted instrument designed to inspire creativity, rhythm, and musical exploration. Made from sustainably sourced bamboo, this eco-friendly drum produces soothing, melodic tones that captivate both children and adults. Its intricate patterns add an artistic touch, making it not only a functional instrument but also a stunning decorative piece.

Key Features & Benefits
Eco-Friendly & Sustainable: Crafted from durable bamboo, the Saigon Drum aligns with QToys’ commitment to sustainability. By choosing this instrument, you support environmentally responsible play.

Soothing & Natural Sound: Unlike metal tongue drums, this wooden version offers a warm, earthy tone that enhances relaxation and mindfulness. It’s perfect for early musical education, meditation, and sensory play.

Enhances Cognitive Development: Playing the tongue drum helps children develop hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills, and auditory processing. As they tap the drum with the included sticks, they refine their rhythmic skills and gain an early appreciation for music.

Versatile & Educational: Whether used at home, in the classroom, or during outdoor play, this drum fosters open-ended musical exploration. It’s an excellent tool for Montessori-inspired learning, encouraging kids to experiment with sound and rhythm.

Artisan Craftsmanship: Each drum is uniquely designed with a traditional wood pattern, reflecting the artistry and cultural heritage of Vietnamese craftsmanship.

Why Choose the QToys Saigon Tongue Drum?
This instrument is more than just a toy—it’s a gateway to creative expression, mindfulness, and hands-on learning. Perfect for kids and adults alike, the Saigon Tongue Drum is a must-have for families looking to incorporate natural, sustainable, and musical play into their daily lives.

Explore rhythm naturally with QToys!

Approx dimensions: 50x9x9cms

name: Tree Abacus
description:
QToys Tree Abacus – A Fun and Engaging Way to Learn Numbers!

Introduce your little one to the exciting world of numbers with the QToys Tree Abacus. This beautifully designed educational toy makes learning hands-on, interactive, and fun. Perfect for early math exploration, it helps children build essential numeracy skills through play.

Engaging and Interactive Learning
The Abacus features a sturdy wooden frame made from rubberwood with natural wooden logs that glide smoothly along rods. This tactile experience allows children to explore counting, addition, and subtraction in a playful way. As they move the logs, they develop a strong foundation in early math skills.

Enhances Fine Motor Skills
Beyond numbers, this abacus supports fine motor development. Sliding the logs strengthens hand muscles, dexterity, and hand-eye coordination. Each movement helps build control and precision, making it a fantastic tool for early childhood learning.

Promotes Cognitive Growth
This tree abacus is more than just a counting toy. It encourages logical thinking and problem-solving, which are essential for cognitive development. As children experiment with different number patterns, they learn to think critically and make connections.

Safe, Eco-Friendly, and Durable
Made from child-safe, non-toxic materials, the QToys Tree Abacus ensures a secure and eco-friendly learning experience. Its natural wood finish and sturdy construction make it a long-lasting educational resource for both classrooms and homes.

Perfect for Playrooms & Classrooms
Whether used at home or in a classroom, this abacus is a valuable learning tool. It introduces children to basic math concepts while encouraging independent thinking and creativity.

Make learning fun, engaging, and educational with the QToys Tree Abacus!

Approx dimensions: 40x10x60cms

name: Emotions Puzzle with Coping Strategies
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]This emotions puzzle with coping strategies is an excellent tool for helping young children develop emotional awareness and regulation. The puzzle features colourful pieces, each representing a different emotion such as happy, sad, angry, excited etc. In addition to identifying emotions, the puzzle encourages children to learn how to manage their feelings with practical coping strategies. Each piece includes thoughtful suggestions. The puzzle also includes an arrow for children to identify how they are feeling in the moment.

The primary benefit of this puzzle is its ability to promote emotional intelligence in children. By recognizing and naming different emotions, children can better understand their own feelings and the feelings of others. This not only supports emotional growth but also helps to reduce the challenges associated with emotional expression. Furthermore, the coping strategies provided encourage children to develop healthy ways of dealing with strong emotions, leading to better emotional regulation.

Additionally, the puzzle supports the development of colour recognition. Each emotion is paired with a distinct colour, helping children make connections between colours and feelings. This provides a fun, interactive way to practice colour identification while also reinforcing emotional concepts. As children rotate the pieces to match the current emotion they are experiencing, they also practice fine motor skills and problem-solving as they fit the pieces back into place.

Overall, this emotions puzzle is a valuable resource for early childhood development. It helps children build emotional awareness, practice coping strategies, and improve cognitive skills like color recognition. By using this puzzle, children can foster a greater understanding of themselves and others, setting the foundation for emotional and social growth.

Approx dimensions: 29x29x3.5cms[/vc_column_text][vc_video link=”https://youtu.be/V6IN6UHbUpE” css=”” title=”Video” image_poster_switch=”no”][/vc_column][/vc_row]
shortDescription: This emotions puzzle with coping strategies is an excellent tool for helping young children develop emotional awareness and regulation. The puzzle features colourful pieces, each representing a different emotion such as happy, sad, angry, excited etc. In addition to identifying emotions, the puzzle encourages children to learn how to manage their feelings with practical coping strategies. Each piece includes thoughtful suggestions.

name: Nature Wonder Play Set
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”” woodmart_inline=”no” text_larger=”no”]The ‘Nature Wonder Play Set’ is an imaginative and eco-friendly toy designed to captivate children’s creativity. This all-in-one set includes beautifully crafted animals, trees, houses and landscape blocks that allow children to design and build their own natural scenes. Made from sustainable materials, this play set is not only safe but also aligns with environmentally conscious values.

Perfect for pretend play, this set encourages kids to explore storytelling and role-playing as they create unique worlds. They can build a serene forest, a bustling village or even a whimsical animal kingdom. With endless possibilities, this play set helps children develop critical thinking, problem-solving, and fine motor skills.

Transitioning from one activity to another is seamless with this versatile set. Children can practice sorting and categorizing pieces by type, such as grouping animals or organizing trees. Additionally, the open-ended design of the set nurtures creativity and allows kids to construct different setups each time they play, fostering imagination and innovation.

This play set also promotes social skills as children can collaborate with siblings or friends to create shared stories and adventures. Teachers and parents will appreciate its educational value as it introduces concepts like habitats, ecosystems and community building in a fun, hands-on way.

What sets the ‘Nature Wonder Play Set’ apart is its ability to connect children with nature-inspired elements, even indoors. The sturdy craftsmanship ensures durability for years of use, while the natural wood finish brings a touch of beauty to any playroom.

In conclusion, the ‘Nature Wonder Play Set’ offers more than just playtime—it’s an investment in your child’s development and imagination. Whether for solo exploration or group fun, this set is a must-have for any young adventurer.

name: Coloured Bamboo Sorting Containers
description:
The Coloured Bamboo Sorting Containers are versatile tools for creative and educational play. Crafted from eco-friendly bamboo, this set of sorting trays is not only durable but also lightweight, making it ideal for young learners. With a sleek, minimalist design, these containers are perfect for organizing, sorting and learning activities at home or in a classroom setting.

One of their uses is for colour sorting activities, where children can group small items like beads, pom-poms or building blocks into the containers based on colour. This activity enhances cognitive development and teaches foundational skills such as classification and organization. Furthermore, these bamboo trays can also be used for counting activities, helping kids understand numbers and quantities in a hands-on way.

In addition to educational benefits, these containers are great for storing small art accessories like crayons, and small stickers. Their natural bamboo finish adds a touch of elegance to any playroom or craft area while keeping everything neatly organized.

The ‘Coloured Bamboo Sorting Containers’ align with Montessori principles, promoting independent and open-ended play. They encourage children to engage in problem-solving and fine motor skill development while exploring their creativity. The smooth edges and sturdy construction ensure safety during playtime, making them suitable for toddlers and young children.

Moreover, these sorting containers are environmentally friendly, made from sustainably sourced bamboo, which contributes to an eco-conscious lifestyle. Their timeless design complements any educational or play environment, making them an essential addition to your child’s learning journey.

In summary, the ‘Coloured Bamboo Sorting Containers’ are more than storage—they’re tools for interactive, eco-friendly learning. Add them to your collection today and let your child explore, organize and learn through play!

*This listing only includes the sorting containers.

Approx dimensions: Each tray: 12x9x4.5cms

name: Mower Push Toy

Firstly, it promotes gross motor skill development by encouraging children to walk, push and explore their surroundings. Additionally, the rolling balls inside offer auditory stimulation, helping children connect movement with sound, which supports sensory processing and coordination.

Moreover, this push mower toy is made from sustainably sourced, non-toxic wood, ensuring a safe playtime experience while being eco-friendly. In summary, the ‘Push Mower Toy’ combines fun, learning and safety into one delightful package. Order yours today and watch your child roll into a world of fun!

name: Fishing Game
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]The Qtoys Fishing Game is an interactive, hands-on toy that brings fun and learning together in a simple, engaging way. This set includes two sturdy fishing rods, ten vibrant fish with numbers from 0 to 9 printed on the back, and a wooden pond to place the fish in. The objective is to use the fishing rod to “catch” each fish, creating a fun and rewarding challenge for young children.

This fishing game promotes a variety of developmental skills. Using the fishing rods to lift each fish encourages fine motor skill development, helping children strengthen their grip and hand-eye coordination. Meanwhile, the colourful fish make it easy for children to identify and recognize different colours, enhancing visual learning. The numbers printed on the back of each fish introduce counting and number recognition. This makes this game an excellent tool for early math skills.

Playing with a friend or family member adds a social dimension, as the Qtoys Fishing Game encourages turn-taking and cooperative play. Children can take turns catching the fish, learning patience and practicing social interactions. These are essential skills for group settings and everyday life.

Made from sustainably sourced wood and painted with non-toxic colours, the Qtoys Fishing Game is eco-friendly, safe, and built to last. In summary, the Qtoys Fishing Game offers an exciting way for children to build essential motor, cognitive, and social skills. It’s the perfect blend of learning and play, encouraging kids to explore colours, numbers, and teamwork naturally.

name: Lacing Train
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]The Qtoys Lacing Train is a delightful and educational toy designed to encourage fine motor skills, counting, and imaginative play. Featuring colourful carriages and numbers from 1 to 10, this wooden train set provides a hands-on way for children to learn numbers and sequencing. Each carriage and number piece is designed with lacing holes, allowing little hands to thread the pieces together in order. This lacing activity strengthens finger dexterity and hand-eye coordination, skills essential for writing and drawing later on.

This toy is not just a lacing tool—it’s also a pull-along train! Once children lace the numbers and carriages, they can pull the train around, sparking creative storytelling and pretend play. Moving the train fosters gross motor skills as children move around, tugging their colourful creation along. The mix of lacing and pulling activities makes this toy a versatile choice that grows with children, offering different ways to play as they develop.

Crafted from sustainable wood and painted with non-toxic colours, the Qtoys Lacing Train is safe, durable, and eco-friendly. Its sturdy design can withstand years of play, making it an ideal choice for families seeking long-lasting, quality toys. The vibrant colours attract children’s attention, making the learning experience both engaging and fun. Parents and educators can also use this toy as a teaching tool, guiding children through number recognition, counting, and colour identification.

The Qtoys Lacing Train offers many benefits, from developing fine motor skills to enhancing cognitive growth through counting and problem-solving. This charming train invites children to explore numbers, colours, and movement in a natural, hands-on way. Perfect for home or classroom use, it’s a toy that combines learning and play beautifully, promoting both educational growth and creative expression.

name: Bamboo Facial Dominos Set Of 20
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Introducing the Bamboo Facial Dominos Set of 20 by Qtoys – a fun and educational way to help children explore emotions. Crafted from sustainable bamboo, this unique set features 20 dominos, each printed with a different facial expression. Along with the dominos, it includes a set of cards that explain each emotion, providing a simple and effective way for children to understand and express their feelings. This set is not only a fantastic tool for teaching emotional intelligence but also promotes early childhood development through interactive play. Children can also draw behind each card using a whiteboard marker. This interactive feature allows children to express themselves through drawing.

As children play with the Bamboo Facial Dominos, they can begin to identify and name a wide range of emotions. Moreover, the cards act as a great conversation starter, encouraging children to reflect on their own emotions and articulate how they feel. Whether used at home or in a classroom setting, this set offers countless opportunities for parents, caregivers, and teachers to engage in meaningful discussions with children about their feelings.

Additionally, the tactile experience of handling the smooth bamboo dominos enhances sensory learning. The natural material is both durable and eco-friendly, aligning with Qtoys’ commitment to sustainability. Not only does this set promote emotional development, but it also fosters problem-solving and matching skills as children learn to connect faces and emotions.

The Bamboo Facial Dominos Set of 20 makes understanding feelings a fun and engaging process, allowing children to grow more aware of their emotions in a safe and playful environment. It’s an ideal addition to any playroom or learning space, supporting social and emotional learning while encouraging environmental responsibility.

name: Montessori Triangle
description:
The Qtoys Montessori Triangle Set is an engaging, hands-on educational tool designed to enhance children’s problem-solving abilities and spatial reasoning skills. This set features triangles in various sizes that can be combined to form larger triangles. Children begin by working with two pieces and gradually progress to using four, learning how to fit them together to create the perfect triangle. This progressive challenge fosters critical thinking as children experiment with different ways to combine the shapes, helping to develop their cognitive abilities and logical reasoning.

What sets the Montessori Triangle Set apart is its flexibility for creative exploration. Beyond simply making triangles, children can experiment with a variety of configurations and designs. Whether they’re forming symmetrical patterns, arranging abstract shapes, or inventing new designs, the set offers endless possibilities for imaginative play. This process not only enhances creativity but also encourages children to think outside the box while developing a deeper understanding of geometry.

Aligned with Montessori principles, the Triangle Set promotes independent learning by allowing children to explore and solve problems on their own. As they work through the challenge of arranging the pieces, they build confidence, which fosters a sense of accomplishment. Additionally, the activity helps strengthen fine motor skills and improve hand-eye coordination, making it a well-rounded learning experience.

The set is also environmentally friendly, crafted from high-quality, eco-conscious materials that ensure durability and long-lasting use. Its versatile design makes it suitable for both individual and group play, providing children with hours of educational entertainment. Ideal for parents and educators, the Qtoys Montessori Triangle Set supports STEM education while encouraging creativity, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills in a fun and interactive way.

Approx dimensions: 22×19.5×3.5cms
shortDescription: The Qtoys Montessori Triangle Set is an engaging and educational tool designed to enhance children’s problem-solving and spatial reasoning skills. This set includes triangles in different sizes that can be used to put together t o form a triangle. By starting with two triangles and gradually progressing to using four pieces, children learn how to fit the shapes together to form a perfect triangle. This hands-on activity fosters critical thinking, as children figure out the best way to combine the pieces, helping to develop their cognitive abilities.

name: Shape Tray Insert
description:
Introducing the innovative ‘Shape Tray Insert’, a fantastic new addition to our range of educational tools designed to promote fine motor skills and early learning. Specifically crafted to fit both the 4-in-1 Activity Table (345) and the Montessori Sand Tray (828), this versatile insert offers a hands-on approach to learning through play. Whether at home or in an educational setting, the Shape Tray Insert is perfect for engaging young minds in meaningful, skill-building activities.

What sets this insert apart is its interactive design, which includes colourful shapes that children can manipulate and sort. The tray features slots through which children can place the shapes, promoting hand-eye coordination and fine motor development. The simple action of placing the shapes through the insert strengthens finger muscles and improves dexterity, making it an excellent activity for early childhood development.

Furthermore, this tray insert also supports shape recognition and colour sorting activities, helping children to recognize and differentiate between different colours  and shapes as they place the shapes into the sections. This element of play not only enhances cognitive skills, but also introduces concepts such as shapes, categorization and organization, which are foundational for math and problem-solving later in life. This tray can also be used as a stencil for tracing shapes.

Parents and educators will appreciate the ‘Shape Tray Insert’s’ durability and easy setup, allowing for seamless transitions between activities. By combining fine motor challenges with colour and shape recognition, this insert provides a well-rounded learning experience that is both fun and educational.

In summary, the Shape Tray Insert is a dynamic tool that encourages learning through hands-on play. Whether you’re focusing on fine motor skills, colour sorting, shape recognition or early cognitive development, this insert is sure to engage children while promoting essential developmental milestones.

*Only includes the shape tray insert with the shapes.

name: Fraction Cake Delight
description:
Introducing the ‘Cake Fraction Delight’ set by QToys, a fun and engaging way for children to explore the concept of fractions while enjoying imaginative play. This beautifully designed wooden set combines the educational value of learning fractions with the joy of pretend play, making it a must-have for both home and classroom environments. Crafted from eco-friendly, sustainable wood, the cake fraction delight set fits perfectly into QToys’ commitment to promoting eco-conscious learning tools.

This set features a delightful “cake” divided into several pieces, each representing different fractions. Children can visually grasp the concept of fractions as they put together and share the cake. By playing with halves, quarters, thirds, and more, they develop an understanding of mathematical concepts in a hands-on and interactive way. This method of learning not only makes math more accessible but also helps to build problem-solving skills and cognitive development through visual and tactile experiences.

In addition to its educational purpose, the Cake Fraction Delight Set also inspires imaginative play. Children can use the set during pretend play scenarios, serving “cake” to their friends, family, or stuffed animals. This type of play encourages social interaction, role-playing, and communication skills, all while reinforcing their understanding of fractions.

Moreover, parents and educators will appreciate the durable construction and timeless appeal of this wooden toy. It’s a wonderful tool for reinforcing lessons learned in school or for introducing mathematical concepts in a fun and playful manner at home. Easy to store and clean, this set is designed to provide long-lasting value for years to come.

In conclusion, the QToys Cake Fraction Delight Set is the perfect blend of learning and fun. It supports essential math skills while sparking creativity and imaginative play, making it an excellent addition to any child’s learning journey.

name: Bamboo Flute
description:
Introducing the new ‘Bamboo Flute’ by QToys, a beautifully crafted musical instrument that combines natural materials with the joy of early music exploration. Made from sustainable bamboo, this flute not only produces delightful sounds but also aligns with QToys’ commitment to eco-friendly, educational products. Perfect for young children, this flute encourages creativity, sensory development, and an appreciation for music from an early age.

What makes the Bamboo Flute stand out is its design, which is simple enough for beginners to enjoy while still producing a rich, melodic sound. Children will love experimenting with the different notes they can create, allowing them to develop their sense of rhythm and pitch. In addition, the flute helps enhance fine motor skills as children learn to control their breath and finger placement, making it an excellent tool for coordination and motor development.

Moreover, the bamboo material not only contributes to the flute’s beautiful aesthetic but also offers a lightweight and durable structure that’s easy for small hands to hold and play. Since bamboo is a renewable resource, this instrument also introduces children to the importance of sustainable choices, fitting perfectly into QToys’ eco-conscious philosophy.

Whether used during music time, as part of a Montessori environment, or for free play, the Bamboo Flute provides endless opportunities for children to explore sound and self-expression. It is also ideal for both individual and group activities, helping to foster teamwork and collaboration when used in a classroom or playgroup setting.

In conclusion, the QToys Bamboo Flute is more than just a musical instrument—it’s a tool for learning, creativity, and environmental awareness. Its eco-friendly design and educational benefits make it a must-have addition to any toy collection, ensuring that children have fun while developing essential life skills.

Designed with versatility in mind, these inserts are compatible with both the SKU 828 Montessori Sand Tray and the SKU 345 4-in-1 Activity Table, offering endless possibilities for creative play and educational setups. Whether you’re looking to organize activities, engage in sensory play, or introduce fine motor skills, these tray inserts are a must-have for any playroom.

Crafted to fit securely over the trays, these inserts provide a stable surface for a variety of tasks. Not only are they ideal for setting up sorting, matching, and stacking activities, but they also double as tools for more advanced skills. For instance, the intricate cutouts in the inserts make them perfect for lacing activities, where children can thread materials through the openings, improving hand-eye coordination and dexterity. Additionally, the cutout shapes serve as excellent stencils for tracing exercises, helping children develop their pre-writing skills while boosting creativity.

Moreover, the durability of these tray inserts ensures they can withstand everyday use, making them a long-lasting addition to your educational materials. Parents and educators alike will appreciate how easy it is to switch between different activities by simply changing the insert. This flexibility supports a range of Montessori-inspired learning experiences, from tactile exploration to early math and literacy exercises.

In conclusion, the Assorted Tray Inserts are designed to enhance your child’s developmental journey, providing multiple ways to engage with the Montessori method. Whether used for lacing, tracing, or structured play, these inserts are sure to inspire hours of learning and fun.

name: Montessori Animal Learning Set
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Introducing the Montessori Animal Learning Set, a beautifully crafted wooden card set featuring animals from A to Z. Each card displays the image of an animal alongside its name, offering children a hands-on, interactive learning experience. Designed with Montessori principles in mind, this set encourages children to explore language, animals, and the alphabet through matching activities.

One of the primary benefits of this set is that it helps build early literacy skills. By matching the animal images with their corresponding names, children strengthen their letter recognition, phonetic awareness, and vocabulary. The act of matching also enhances cognitive development and memory retention, as children begin to associate letters with specific animals. This boosts their confidence and prepares them for future reading and writing activities.

Additionally, the Montessori Animal Learning Set promotes fine motor skills. Handling the wooden cards helps develop hand-eye coordination and dexterity. These physical movements are essential for children as they practice skills that will later help them with writing, drawing, and other daily tasks.

Furthermore, this set pairs perfectly with the Qtoys Montessori Tray, specifically designed to organize and display the animal cards. Using the tray allows children to keep the cards neatly arranged while also fostering a sense of independence as they work through the activity on their own. The tray enhances the learning environment by promoting order and focus, essential principles in Montessori education.

In conclusion, the Montessori Animal Learning Set offers a comprehensive learning tool that combines alphabet mastery, animal knowledge, and hands-on skill-building. Its alignment with Montessori philosophy encourages self-directed learning and exploration. Whether used at home or in the classroom, this set is a wonderful addition to any educational setting. Plus, with the Montessori tray, it ensures an organized, engaging experience for young learners.

*Listing only includes animal cards not tray.[/vc_column_text][vc_video link=”https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mbuyypsrjhs” css=”” title=”Video” image_poster_switch=”no”][/vc_column][/vc_row]

name: Farm Fresh Fruit Bag Set of 8
description:
Introducing the Qtoys Farm Fresh Fruit Bag Set of 8, a beautifully crafted wooden set that includes seven colorful fruits and a reusable fruit bag. Designed for imaginative play, this set encourages children to explore the world of food, cooking, and healthy eating through hands-on experiences. Each piece is made from eco-friendly, sustainable materials, offering a natural look and feel that enhances playtime.

Children can pretend to be chefs, farmers, or shopkeepers, immersing themselves in role-playing scenarios. As they engage in pretend play, they develop essential social skills and expand their vocabulary by interacting with others. The Fruit set is perfect for sparking conversations about food, health, and nutrition, helping children learn while they play. For example, they can identify fruits by their names, shapes, and colours, boosting their cognitive development.

The set’s fruit bag adds a practical element to play. Children can use it to “shop” for fruits, which helps improve fine motor skills as they pack and unpack the bag. Additionally, this activity enhances hand-eye coordination and strengthens small muscles in the hands and fingers.

Qtoys’ Fruit Bag Set also encourages eco-conscious values. By introducing children to sustainably sourced materials and food through play, this set fosters an appreciation for nature. Parents can use it as an opportunity to discuss the benefits of natural products and a healthy lifestyle, reinforcing positive habits at an early age.

In conclusion, the Qtoys Farm Fresh Fruit Bag Set of 8 is more than just a toy. It provides opportunities for imaginative play, promotes skill-building, and helps children understand the importance of healthy eating and eco-friendly living. With its endless play possibilities, this set is a wonderful addition to any child’s learning journey. This set is made of rubberwood.

name: Sorting Horse cart
description:
Introducing the Qtoys Sorting Horse Cart. It is a charming and multifunctional toy. It seamlessly combines the joys of imaginative play with the educational benefits of shape sorting. This beautifully designed wooden toy features a sturdy horse pulling a carriage, where different shapes can be sorted and fitted into the corresponding slots. It’s a delightful way for children to explore their creativity while developing essential cognitive and motor skills.

Imaginative play is a cornerstone of early childhood development. This Sorting Horse Cart offers endless opportunities for storytelling and role-playing. As children embark on imaginary journeys, guiding their horse and cart through various adventures, they cultivate their social and emotional skills. They learn to express their ideas, engage with others in shared narratives, and build confidence in their creative abilities. This type of play also enhances language development as children describe the scenes they envision and the stories they create.

The sorting aspect of the cart adds an educational dimension to the fun. As children work to fit the different shapes into the correct slots on the carriage, they develop their problem-solving abilities and spatial awareness. This activity also improves fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. It requires precision and control to match each shape with its corresponding space. Additionally, identifying and sorting shapes contributes to cognitive development, helping children recognize patterns and make connections.

Crafted from eco-friendly, sustainable wood, the Qtoys Sorting Horse Cart is as durable as it is engaging. The vibrant, non-toxic colors make it visually appealing, while the high-quality craftsmanship ensures it can withstand years of play.

Whether used at home or in a classroom, the Qtoys Sorting Horse Cart is more than just a toy—it’s a tool for learning, growth, and endless creative exploration. Let your child’s imagination run wild while they learn important skills with this versatile and enchanting playset!

name: Balls on Pegs
description:
Introducing the Qtoys Montessori Balls on Pegs—a thoughtfully designed educational tool that encourages hands-on learning and supports the development of essential motor skills. This set features a series of wooden balls that fit perfectly onto corresponding pegs, providing a simple yet engaging activity for young children. Crafted from high-quality, sustainable wood, the balls on pegs set is both durable and aesthetically pleasing, making it a valuable addition to any early learning environment.

One of the primary benefits of this set is its focus on developing fine motor skills. As children grasp the wooden balls and carefully place them onto the pegs, they refine their hand-eye coordination and pincer grip—skills that are critical for tasks such as writing and self-feeding. This activity also promotes concentration and patience, as children must align the balls precisely with the pegs to complete the task successfully. The repetitive nature of the activity allows for practice and mastery, helping to build confidence and a sense of accomplishment.

Moreover, the Montessori approach emphasizes learning through exploration and discovery, and this set is an excellent tool for fostering independent play. This open-ended play encourages creativity and problem-solving. Additionally, the tactile experience of handling the smooth wooden balls provides sensory stimulation, enhancing the learning experience.

Transitioning from solitary play to interactive learning is seamless with the Qtoys Balls on Pegs set. Parents and educators can use this tool to introduce early math concepts, such as counting and sorting, making it a versatile resource for foundational education. The set’s natural wooden finish and sturdy construction ensure that it will withstand the rigors of daily use while providing a safe and engaging experience for children.

name: Square Fraction Puzzle
description:
Introducing the Qtoys Square Fraction Puzzle—a beautifully crafted educational tool designed to make learning Math concepts both engaging and fun. This puzzle features a series of brightly coloured, wooden square pieces that fit together to form a complete square, with each piece representing a different fraction. From halves to quarters and smaller fractions, this puzzle offers a hands-on approach to understanding basic mathematical concepts while also introducing children to colours.

One of the key benefits of the Square Fraction Puzzle is its ability to simplify complex ideas. As children manipulate the pieces, they begin to grasp the concept of fractions in a concrete and tangible way. By physically dividing and combining the pieces, they can see how different fractions fit together to make a whole, gaining a deeper understanding of how halves, quarters, and smaller portions relate to each other. This visual and tactile method of learning is particularly effective for young minds, helping to solidify abstract concepts through play.

Moreover, the puzzle is an excellent tool for teaching colour recognition. Each fraction is a distinct bright colour, allowing children to associate different parts of the square with different hues. As they play, they not only learn about fractions but also develop their ability to identify and differentiate colours. This dual learning experience makes the puzzle a versatile addition to any educational setting, seamlessly blending mathematical and artistic development.

Transitioning from play to learning is effortless with the Qtoys Square Fraction Puzzle. Its design encourages exploration and discovery, allowing children to experiment with different combinations and see the results of their actions. This process of trial and error not only enhances their problem-solving skills but also boosts their confidence as they master new concepts.

This puzzle features a series of brightly coloured, wooden square pieces that fit together to form a complete square, with each piece representing a different fraction. Versatile and practical, our jumbo wooden spoons can be used for a variety of purposes. name: Traffic Sign Domino Set
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Introducing our new Traffic Sign Domino Set, a fantastic addition to any child’s playtime and learning activities. This set includes 28 beautifully crafted wooden tiles, each featuring traffic signs. It’s designed to be both fun and educational, helping children learn to recognize various traffic signs while enjoying a classic game of dominoes.

Objective: Get rid of all the dominoes in your hand. Number of Players: 2 to 4

Set-Up: Start by shuffling all 28 dominoes face down. For a game with two players, each player draws seven dominoes. If there are three or four players, each player draws five dominoes. The remaining dominoes are left face down on the table, forming a draw pile. To begin, place one starting domino in the middle of the table.

Players take turns matching the traffic signs on their dominoes with those on the tiles already in play. If a player cannot match a sign, they must draw a domino from the center pile. The game continues until one player successfully gets rid of all their dominoes. The first player to do so is the winner.

This Traffic Sign Domino Set is perfect for children, combining the excitement of a game with the educational benefit of learning traffic signs. By playing, children become familiar with important road symbols, which is a valuable skill for their future safety.

Moreover, the versatility of the wooden tiles extends beyond the game itself. Children can use the dominoes to line them up and knock them down, which adds another layer of fun and creativity to playtime. This activity also helps develop fine motor skills and understanding of cause and effect.

Crafted from high-quality wood, the dominoes are durable and safe for children. The vibrant colors and clear illustrations of the traffic signs make them visually appealing and easy to recognize.

In summary, our Traffic Sign Domino Set offers a unique blend of play and learning. It’s an engaging way for children to familiarize themselves with traffic signs while enjoying a classic game. Whether matching signs or creating domino runs, this set promises hours of educational fun. It’s an excellent gift for young learners and a valuable tool for parents and educators aiming to teach children about road safety in a playful manner.[/vc_column_text][vc_video link=”https://youtube.com/shorts/AzTJNFSqOXo” css=”” title=”Video” image_poster_switch=”no”][/vc_column][/vc_row]

description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Explore boundless opportunities with our set of 6 coconut bowls! Handcrafted from authentic coconut shells, these bowls infuse every activity with a touch of natural elegance. Whether children are organizing vibrant color sorting games, arranging loose parts, or delving into imaginative play, these versatile bowls enrich every experience, fostering creativity and exploration.

Engaging in colour sorting activities with our coconut bowls offers a multitude of benefits for children. Through sorting and categorizing objects by colour, children develop essential cognitive skills such as classification, visual discrimination, and problem-solving. They learn to identify similarities and differences, enhancing their understanding of basic concepts like colors and patterns.

Additionally, colour sorting activities promote fine motor skills as children manipulate objects and place them into the corresponding bowls. This hands-on approach strengthens hand-eye coordination and dexterity, preparing children for tasks like writing and drawing.

Beyond cognitive and motor skill development, colour sorting activities also encourage social interaction and cooperation when children engage in group play. They learn to communicate, share, and collaborate with others, fostering important social skills such as teamwork and empathy.

Beyond playtime, these charming coconut bowls seamlessly transition to the dining table, becoming perfect vessels for serving up favorite snacks or dips with both style and eco-consciousness. Embrace sustainability without compromising on functionality or sophistication with our coconut dipping bowls – a conscious choice for the environment.

Using natural and sustainable products isn’t just a trend; it’s a conscious decision to reduce our environmental footprint and preserve the planet for future generations. With our coconut bowls set of 6, children not only enjoy the beauty of nature but also learn about the importance of eco-friendly choices, instilling values of environmental stewardship from a young age. description:
Introducing our QToys watermelon fraction learning kit – a scrumptious blend of education and play! Dive into the world of fractions with this innovative set, designed to make learning a slice of fun while developing our numeracy skills.

Crafted with precision, our watermelon fraction learning kit features vibrant and lifelike slices, each representing different fractional parts. Watch as your little ones eagerly engage in hands-on exploration, dividing and combining slices to grasp the fundamentals of fractions in a deliciously interactive way.

Moreover, made from high-quality, child-safe materials, this set ensures a safe and enjoyable learning experience. The tactile and visual appeal of the watermelon slices makes mastering fractions an appetizing adventure, thus promoting the development of numeracy skills.

Furthermore, transform math lessons into a delightful watermelon party with the QToys watermelon fraction learning kit – where learning is as enjoyable as sharing a slice of your favorite fruit! With its engaging design and educational value, this kit offers a refreshing approach to teaching fractions, ensuring that children not only understand the concepts but also have fun while doing so.

Additionally, the versatility of the watermelon fraction learning kit extends beyond the classroom. Encourage imaginative play by incorporating the watermelon slices into pretend kitchen scenarios or outdoor picnics. Children can practice fraction concepts while role-playing as chefs or hosting their own fruit-themed tea party, enhancing their learning experience through creative exploration.

In conclusion, our QToys watermelon fraction set is more than just a teaching tool – it’s a gateway to a world of interactive learning and imaginative play. The watermelon fraction set is the perfect choice for turning learning moments into unforgettable experiences.

name: Learning Tower – Natural
description:
Elevate Your Child’s Learning Experience with Our Learning Tower – Natural

Empower Little Helpers with a Safe and Sturdy Platform

Discover the perfect tool to foster independence and creativity in your child with our fantastic Learning Tower – Natural. This versatile accessory is designed to provide a secure platform for children to actively participate in household activities, encouraging them to take initiative and engage in hands-on learning experiences. Our Learning Tower – Natural is more than just a platform—it’s a multifunctional piece of furniture that grows with your child. Equipped with a built-in whiteboard and a convenient clipboard, this tower offers endless opportunities for creative expression and learning. Whether your child is drawing, writing, or engaging in imaginative play, the versatile design of our learning tower ensures that they have everything they need to thrive at every stage of development. Plus, with the ability to transform into a high chair for feeding, this tower adapts to accommodate your child’s changing needs, providing a seamless transition from playtime to mealtime.

Boost Confidence and Artistic Skills

Encourage your child to unleash their creativity with the built-in whiteboard feature of our Learning Tower – Natural. Standing at the perfect height, children can confidently explore drawing and writing, honing their artistic skills while expressing themselves freely. The surface of the whiteboard is easy to wipe clean, allowing for hassle-free maintenance and a tidy play area. With the added convenience of a clipboard, children can secure sheets of paper and let their imagination run wild, creating masterpieces that showcase their unique talents and abilities.

Specifications and Recommendations

  • Material: Natural wood construction
  • Features: Built-in whiteboard and clipboard

Invest in Your Child’s Learning Journey Today

Transform playtime into a valuable learning experience with our Learning Tower – Natural. name: Sparky Number Game
description:
Our sparky number game offers a captivating tile-laying card experience where players create sequences of numbers, or “runs,” using a set of 49 colorful tiles. By drawing tiles from a “kitty,” players strategically place tiles to form sequences of at least three numbers in any direction while ensuring no two tiles of the same color are adjacent. Points are scored for each turn until the “kitty” is empty or players can’t make moves. At the game’s end, unplayed tiles are subtracted from a player’s score, with the highest score winning. It’s a delightful blend of strategy, sequencing, and color coordination, promising hours of engaging fun.

How to play:

Begin by turning over all 49 tiles and shuffling them to form a “kitty”. Each player then takes 5 tiles from the “kitty”.
Turn over one tile from the “kitty”. The first player then places alongside that number as many tiles as possible from their hand to create a run (sequence of numbers) like 1-2-3 or 3-4-5. The sequence may go in any direction but must consist of at least 3 tiles.
Ensure that no two tiles of the same color are adjacent.
After the first player’s turn, calculate the total of the numbers played and place it under that player’s initial.
The next player to their left lays down one or more tiles to make a run. Add together the total of the two tiles next to each other and place it under that player’s initial.
The game concludes when there are no more tiles in the “kitty” or players can’t make further moves.
If any players have tiles left, deduct the total of the numbers left in their hand from their score. The winner is the player with the most points at that time. The tile combination includes 1 of each of the seven colors multiplied by 7, resulting in 49 tiles.

For more information check us out on

Youtube channel

Follow Us on Facebook
shortDescription: Our sparky number game is a captivating tile-laying card game where players aim to create sequences of numbers, or “runs,” using a set of 49 colorful tiles. The game involves drawing tiles from a “kitty,” with each player strategically placing tiles to form sequences of at least three numbers in any direction, while adhering to a rule that prevents two tiles of the same color from being adjacent. Points are scored for each turn, and the game continues until the “kitty” is empty or players can no longer make moves. At the game’s end, any unplayed tiles in a player’s hand are subtracted from their score, and the player with the highest score emerges as the winner. It is a delightful blend of strategy, sequencing, and color coordination that offers hours of enjoyable gameplay.

name: Wooden Solar System -STEM Space Exploration Board
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”” woodmart_inline=”no” text_larger=”no”]

Bring the galaxy down to Earth with the Qtoys Wooden Solar System. Crafted from sustainable timber, this interactive learning board helps children visualize the vastness of space in a tactile, accessible way.

Unlike standard space puzzles, this board is engineered to support the Qtoys 3-Tier Development Tree, offering layers of play that advance as your child grows:

1. The Physical Universe (Motor Skills): Perfect for younger children, the recessed planet slots encourage fine motor control and the “pincer grasp.” Children learn through trial and error as they discover that the massive Jupiter won’t fit in Mercury’s small spot!

2. Naming & Ordering (Literacy & Science): Printed with clear, easy-to-read text, the board helps children memorize the names of the celestial bodies. The distinct orbital lines (orange paths) allow children to trace the journey of the planets, fostering pre-writing skills and an understanding of movement.

3. Space Science & Logic (STEM Learning): For older learners, the board features a “Distance from the Sun” data table. This turns play into a “Mission Control” activity where children can compare numbers, analyze data, and understand that planets further away take longer to complete their “year.”

Key Features:

  • Tactile Learning: Features removable wooden planet discs with colorful, detailed illustrations (including Earth’s continents and Saturn’s rings).

  • Data Integration: Includes a printed chart listing the distance of every planet from the Sun in millions/billions of kilometers.

  • Orbital Guides: Orange tracking lines help children visualize planetary paths and distance.

  • Eco-Friendly: Made from solid, sustainable timber with a natural finish that highlights the wood grain.

  • Multi-Stage Educational Tool: Supports fine motor skills, visual perception, vocabulary, and logical reasoning.

Specifications

  • Material: Sustainable solid wood with non-toxic, child-safe paints.

  • Dimensions: [Insert Dimensions here, e.g., 40cm x 30cm x 2cm]

  • Recommended Age: 2+ Years

  • Includes: 1 x Wooden Board, 8 x Planet Discs, 1 x Sun fixed feature .

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]
shortDescription: Blast off into learning! The Wooden Solar System is more than just a puzzle—it is a hands-on scientific instrument for young astronomers. Designed to grow with your child, this beautiful wooden board introduces the wonders of the cosmos, from fine motor “gravity drops” to understanding planetary orbits and distances.

Furthermore, the act of creating something tangible provides a sense of accomplishment and pride for children. Overall, the bead box lacing and threading set offers numerous benefits beyond just being a recreational activity. name: Shell Rattle & Mirror Set
description:
This new Shell Rattle & Mirror Set is an exciting addition to our collection, offering both a wooden rattle and a mirror designed to provide endless hours of fun and stimulation for your little one.

Our wooden toy rattle is crafted from high-quality, natural wood, making it safe and durable for babies and toddlers to play with. Its gentle rattling sound is sure to captivate and entertain your child, stimulating their auditory senses as they shake and explore the toy.

What’s unique about this set is that the rattle also fits into the mirror, creating an engaging puzzle-like experience for your child to fix together. This adds an element of problem-solving and coordination to their play, enhancing their cognitive development and fine motor skills.

Mirrors are not only fun for babies to look at, but they can also be powerful tools for promoting development and learning. When babies see their reflections in a mirror, they begin to learn about their own bodies and movements. This helps them develop a sense of self-awareness and body consciousness, laying the foundation for future social and emotional growth.

Furthermore, interacting with a mirror encourages babies to engage in self-exploration and discovery. They may make funny faces, reach out to touch their reflection, or even babble and coo as they interact with the “baby” in the mirror. This playful interaction fosters curiosity and confidence in their own abilities, boosting their overall development.

Recommended age: 6months+

name: Classic Wooden Dollhouse
description:
Looking for a doll house that can spark your child’s imagination? Our 3-story classic wooden dollhouse is the perfect choice. Imagination plays a crucial role in children’s early learning, opening the door for children to explore the world around them! This house is one of our favorites for imaginative play, and your boys and girls will absolutely adore it!

This house is an open-ended toy which provides children with the perfect opportunity to explore their imaginative skills. Imaginative play is when children enact an event or experience in their life that they have come across or found interesting. It allows them to create stories and explore new ideas as they connect with the world around them. Similarly open-ended play is also a kind of play that encourages children to freely express their creative thoughts and ideas. They express themselves using their words which promotes language development.

During their pretend play experiences, children come across challenges which they learn to overcome thus developing their problem-solving skills. Another important benefit of pretend play is, it helps develop your toddlers’ emotional needs as they learn to express and understand their feelings. This doll house is also great for storytelling purposes. Thus, this three-story classic wooden dollhouse provides children with endless opportunities through which they can develop their emotional, imaginative, language and creative skills.

name: Fruit Knob Puzzle
description:
Introducing our new fruit knob puzzle! Made of rubber wood, it consists of 8 pieces of fruit with a little knob perfect for little ones to grasp. Children can be encouraged to fix the pieces of puzzle which promotes their fine motor skills. They can also learn to identify the different fruit pieces along with their colours thus promoting their literacy skills and colour recognition.

Completing puzzles takes some time and patience. Practicing patience is one of the best benefits children gain through completing puzzles. Puzzles promote the development of hand-eye coordination, concentration and visual perception as children try to fix the pieces of the puzzle together.

Puzzles also promote the development of fine motor skills and problem-solving skills which are useful in life. They also help improve memory as the children try and figure out where the pieces of the puzzles go based on their shape. Children feel a sense of achievement as they fix the pieces of the puzzle. By using their logical reasoning, they figure out which piece of the puzzle goes where.
This fruit shape puzzle is therefore ideal for developing their critical thinking skills and it is also a great educational resource to promote cognitive thinking for your children.

name: The Number sense builder
description:
Introduce Counting and Numbers with Our Natural Counting Set

Comprehensive Learning Bundle

Our natural counting bundle is a comprehensive set designed to introduce children to the fascinating world of numbers. It includes essential tools such as the coconut counting jar, the number puzzle, and a set of two-tone numbers from 0 to 9. With this bundle, children can embark on an engaging journey of numerical exploration and discovery.

Stimulate Numeracy Development

  • Coconut Counting Jar: Featuring 100 counters, our coconut counting jar offers hands-on learning opportunities for children to practice counting and number recognition.
  • Number Puzzle: Our stunning number puzzle provides a tactile experience for children to explore and identify numbers from 0 to 9. Through play, they develop essential numeracy skills while enhancing hand-eye coordination and fine motor abilities.
  • Two-Tone Number Set: With 20 numbers from 0 to 9, our two-tone number set further reinforces early math skills and encourages numerical comprehension.

Promote Holistic Skill Development

As children engage with our natural counting set, they not only learn numerical concepts but also develop a range of fundamental skills:

  • Numeracy Skills: Children practice counting, number recognition, and numerical sequencing.
  • Fine Motor Skills: Manipulating the counters and puzzle pieces enhances hand-eye coordination and dexterity.
  • Language Development: Through verbalizing numbers and engaging with the materials, children strengthen their language skills.

Dimensions and Specifications

  • Product Dimensions: L28xW18xH2cms
  • Weight: 0.5kgs
  • Recommended Age: 2+

Embark on a Numerical Adventure

Ignite a passion for learning with our Natural Counting Set. Designed to inspire curiosity and promote early math skills, it’s the perfect educational tool for young learners. Explore our collection today and watch your child’s numeracy skills flourish.

description:
Explore Letters and Numbers with Our Natural Number & Alphabet Bundle

Exciting Introduction to Letters and Numbers

Are you searching for an engaging set of puzzles to introduce your children to the world of letters and numbers? Look no further! Our natural alphabet and number puzzle bundle is the ideal tool to kickstart your child’s journey into literacy and numeracy. This comprehensive bundle includes upper-case, lower-case, and number puzzles, providing a holistic learning experience for young learners.

Foster Literacy and Numeracy Development

  • Upper- and Lower-Case Puzzles: Our alphabet puzzles offer a dynamic way for children to familiarize themselves with the letters of the alphabet. Through hands-on exploration, children identify letters and associate them with their sounds, laying the foundation for literacy development.
  • Number Puzzle: The number puzzle introduces children to numerical concepts, allowing them to recognize and sequence numbers. As they engage with the puzzle, children develop essential numeracy skills that prepare them for mathematical learning.

Enhance Fine Motor Skills and Problem-Solving Abilities

Completing puzzles offers numerous cognitive and physical benefits for children:

  • Fine Motor Skills: Manipulating puzzle pieces enhances hand-eye coordination and dexterity, crucial for tasks like writing and drawing.
  • Problem-Solving Skills: As children match puzzle pieces, they exercise logical reasoning and critical thinking, honing their problem-solving abilities.
  • Concentration and Patience: Puzzles encourage children to focus and persevere, promoting patience and resilience.

Dimensions and Specifications

  • Product Dimensions: L30xW20xH2cms
  • Weight: 0.5kgs
  • Recommended Age: 2+

name: Counting Bundle
description:
Our Counting Bundle is an exceptional educational resource designed to foster a love for mathematics in children.

The set comprises of twenty wooden pieces, including the wooden boards labelled with numbers 1 through 10, corresponding wooden balls to fit into each board, and wooden numbers from 0 to 9.

As children place the wooden balls onto the boards, they not only practice counting but also refine their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Additionally, this tactile engagement enhances their understanding of numerical concepts while simultaneously promoting physical dexterity.

Moreover, the act of identifying and counting numbers contributes to the development of numeracy skills and lays a solid foundation for language acquisition. What’s more is that through hands-on interaction with the counting bundle, children naturally absorb mathematical concepts, making learning an enjoyable and intuitive process.

We ensure ethical sourcing and fair-trade practices in crafting all QToys products, including our Counting Bundle, using environmentally friendly materials and maintaining ethical working conditions.

Please note that although the colours of the wooden balls may vary, we carefully select each component to meet our quality standards. The approximate dimensions of the boards are 13x9x15cms, with a weight of 0.6kgs, making it convenient for young learners to handle.

Recommended for children aged 2 and above.

description:

The wooden alphabet set consists of 26 lowercase letters. As children explore these letters, they will begin to identify the letters of the alphabet. Children can learn to write and form words by using these letters.

Our lower-case puzzle is also a great way to introduce children to the letters of the alphabet. As children explore these letters, they will begin to identify the letters of the alphabet which are beneficial for literacy and language development. Children can learn to write and form words by using these letters.

Learning letters is extremely beneficial for children as letters form words and sentences and this is how we communicate with one another. Therefore, it is important to give children the opportunity to learn and recognize letters. Children can also attempt to fix the letters in the right spot thus promoting the use of their fine motor skills.

name: Container Ship Sorting Bundle
description:
Our Container Ship Sorting Bundle comes with 6 coloured removable sorting containers. This is perfect for imaginative play, as well as all your sorting activities. This ship provides children with the opportunity to identify and recognise colours as they engage in sorting experiences.

This sorting ship can have several educational benefits for children, including:

  1. Cognitive development: Sorting objects can help improve children’s memory, concentration, and attention to detail.
  2. Fine motor skills: The act of picking up and placing the objects into the containers requires dexterity and hand-eye coordination, which can improve fine motor skills.
  3. Problem-solving skills: Sorting and arranging the containers based on colour can help develop problem-solving skills and critical thinking.
  4. Vocabulary building: Playing with a sorting ship and containers set can also help children learn about different shapes, sizes, and colors, expanding their vocabulary.
  5. Imagination and creativity: Children can use their imagination to create different scenarios and stories with the train and containers, encouraging creativity.

Playing with a sorting ship set can be a fun and educational way for children to develop their cognitive, fine motor, and problem-solving skills.

Recommended age: 2+

name: Flora Alphabet Set
description:

Beyond mere letter recognition, these sets serve as versatile educational tools, catering to a spectrum of developmental milestones. Young learners embark on a journey of phonics exploration, unravelling the mysteries of sound-symbol correspondence, while simultaneously honing spelling prowess. Vocabulary acquisition becomes a botanical odyssey, as children immerse themselves in the lexicon of flora.

These sets emerge as catalysts for cultivating a profound connection with nature and science. By intertwining letters with botanical marvels, they kindle an innate curiosity about the world’s verdant tapestry. name: Sorting Train
description:
Our Sorting Train, comprising six carriages, offers boundless opportunities for imaginative play. Each carriage is uniquely named according to its colour, enriching children’s ability to identify and sort colours while fostering an engaging play experience.

This sorting train serves as a catalyst for various educational benefits. These include:

  1. Cognitive development receives a boost as children engage in sorting activities, enhancing memory, concentration, and attention to detail.
  2. Fine motor skills flourish as little hands deftly pick up and place objects into the designated containers, refining dexterity and hand-eye coordination.
  3. Problem-solving abilities are honed as children categorize and arrange containers by colour, nurturing critical thinking skills.
  4. Vocabulary expands as children explore diverse shapes, sizes, and colours through play, enriching their language skills.
  5. Imagination and creativity soar as children invent stories and scenarios with the train and containers, fostering creative thinking.

Furthermore, playing with our Sorting Train is not just enjoyable; it’s an educational journey that nurtures cognitive, fine motor, and problem-solving skills while fostering imagination and creativity.

Please note this listing is for the train and carriages only.

Our Sorting Containers are available here.

name: Human Evolution Puzzle & Lacing Set
description:
Human evolution is a fascinating journey, and our puzzle offers an engaging way for children to explore this complex process. With four intricately crafted wooden pieces representing key stages of evolution—Australopithecus, Homo Erectus, Neanderthal man, and Modern Man—this puzzle provides a hands-on demonstration of how humans evolved from apelike ancestors.

As children lace each piece onto the board using a string, they not only piece together the puzzle, but also enhance their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Manipulating the string requires precision and control, making it a perfect activity for developing these essential abilities. Moreover, the concentration required to thread each piece helps children build their attention span, fostering focus and persistence.

Beyond motor skills, this puzzle offers valuable learning opportunities. What’s more is by identifying and matching each stage of evolution, children not only deepen their understanding of human development, but also expand their vocabulary and language skills. As they discuss the differences between Australopithecus, Homo Erectus, Neanderthal man, and Modern Man, they engage in meaningful dialogue that promotes language development and critical thinking.

By promoting fine motor skills, language development, and an understanding of human evolution, it offers a comprehensive educational experience.

Approx dimensions of product: 30x20x2 cms. Weight: 0.8kg

Recommended age: 3+

For more information, check out our socials:

Instagram

name: Food Chain Lacing Set
description:
This Food Chain Lacing Set, thoughtfully crafted, comprises a quartet of wooden pieces representing key players in the chain: an insect, a frog, a snake, and a bird, accompanied by a string. Through tactile engagement, children are empowered to assemble these pieces, mimicking the progression of energy transfer in ecosystems. The term “food chain” encapsulates the intricate web of dependencies among various organisms as they rely on each other for sustenance.

Beyond its tangible components, this set serves as a gateway to understanding the dynamic relationships within ecosystems. As children thread the string through each wooden creature, they’re not merely stringing beads; they’re threading together concepts of predator and prey, herbivores and carnivores, illustrating the flow of energy through nature’s intricate tapestry.

Moreover, the benefits extend far beyond conceptual understanding. As children identify and manipulate each wooden piece, their language skills flourish, as they articulate the characteristics and roles of each creature. Meanwhile, the delicate task of threading promotes fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination, fostering dexterity and precision.

Furthermore, through focused engagement with the set, children cultivate their attention spans, honing their ability to concentrate. Thus, this set not only nurtures an understanding of ecological principles but also cultivates essential cognitive abilities, laying a sturdy foundation for lifelong learning and exploration.

The approximate dimensions of the lacing set are 50x14x2 cm
Recommended age 3+
Made of Australian Timber

Through this immersive experience, young readers embark on a journey of discovery, unlocking the magic of storytelling while honing essential language skills that will accompany them on their educational journey.

name: Bamboo Roll A Ball Track
description:
Introducing the captivating Bamboo Roll-a-Ball Track activity play set, complete with bamboo loose parts and an engaging track that you can easily assemble. This set can be used with wooden balls ( SKU 490 , SKU 571,  SKU 028 , SKU 024 ) that can roll down the track. This track can also be used for water play.

The assembly process isn’t just about putting pieces together—it’s an opportunity for children to flex their cognitive muscles as they figure out how to construct the track. This hands-on task also promotes the development of fine and gross motor skills as little ones manipulate the parts to fix the track in place.

Once assembled, the real fun begins! Releasing the ball at the top of the track introduces kids to the concept of cause and effect, sparking curiosity and prompting them to ask questions—a crucial aspect of language development. Plus, as they guide the ball through the track, they refine their hand-eye coordination skills, enhancing their overall dexterity.

Now, let’s talk bamboo—nature’s gift to toy making. Not only is it eco-friendly, but it’s also lightweight, durable, and incredibly resilient. Embracing its natural origins, each bamboo piece may feature unique blemishes, adding to the product’s organic charm. Crafted with care from natural bamboo, every piece varies in size, shape, and color, ensuring that each set is truly one-of-a-kind.

Furthermore, bamboo’s non-toxic properties make these toys safe for children of all ages.

For optimal longevity, make sure to thoroughly dry the product before storing it away. With its blend of sustainability, functionality, and endless fun, this Bamboo Roll-a-Ball set is sure to be a hit with kids and parents alike!

*Balls not included in this set.

description:

Imaginative play is the cornerstone of childhood development, allowing kids to recreate real-life scenarios or invent their own adventures. With our fruit basket set, children are encouraged to engage in role-playing activities, mirroring the actions of their caregivers.

As children interact with the colourful fruits and vegetables in the set, they embark on a journey of learning and discovery. Not only do they get to identify different fruits and veggies, but they also learn to distinguish between colours.

But the learning doesn’t stop there! Our activity set also provides ample opportunities for honing fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. As children use the safe, pretend knife to “slice” and “dice” their fruits, they exercise precise movements and refine their coordination—a crucial aspect of early childhood development.

In essence, our Wooden Coloured Fruit Basket Set is more than just a toy—it’s a multifaceted tool for nurturing children’s growth and development. From fine motor skills to imaginative play and language development, this set offers a holistic approach to learning and exploration.

So, whether it’s slicing juicy watermelons or sorting vibrant apples, this set promises endless hours of entertainment and educational fun for budding young minds. Let the adventures begin!

Recommended age 3+

name: Ball Rattle
description:
Introducing the ideal companion for babies aged 6 months and up, straight from our Baby Deluxe range—the  Ball Rattle! More than just a source of entertainment, rattles offer a wealth of educational benefits for little ones.

At its core, a rattle provides babies with the joy of making sounds, sparking their curiosity and engagement. As they shake the rattle and hear the delightful sounds it produces, they begin to grasp the concept of cause and effect—the notion that their actions yield specific outcomes.

But the benefits don’t stop there! As babies learn to grasp and manipulate the rattle, they’re actively developing their fine motor skills—a crucial milestone in their early development journey. By immersing themselves in the sights and sounds of their surroundings, they not only grow physically but also cognitively, absorbing new experiences and concepts along the way.

Indeed, for babies, play is more than just fun—it’s a pathway to learning and exploration. And what better way to facilitate this journey than with our Ball Rattle? Whether it’s a gift for a new arrival or a first birthday celebration, this charming rattle is sure to delight both babies and parents alike, making it the perfect addition to any nursery or playtime routine.

Approx dimensions of product: 16cm x 8cm

Recommended age: 6months+

name: Bee Life Cycle Hive
description:
Introducing our stunning Bee Life Cycle puzzle—an educational journey through nature’s wonders.

Crafted from natural and eco-friendly materials, our puzzles offer a safe and durable option for children to explore and learn. But beyond their aesthetic appeal, puzzles offer a host of developmental benefits that are essential for young minds.

Completing a puzzle requires patience and persistence—qualities that children cultivate as they work through each piece. This process promotes the development of hand-eye coordination, concentration, and visual perception, laying a solid foundation for future learning endeavours.

Moreover, puzzles are excellent tools for honing fine motor skills and problem-solving abilities, essential skills that children will carry with them throughout life. As they engage with the puzzle, children also exercise their memory, recalling where each piece fits into the larger picture.

With each successful completion, children experience a sense of accomplishment and pride, boosting their confidence and self-esteem. Our bee life cycle puzzle not only serves as an educational resource but also encourages critical thinking and cognitive development in children.

So, whether it’s exploring the wonders of nature or sharpening cognitive skills, our puzzles provide endless opportunities for learning and growth. Bring the magic of the life cycle of a bee into your child’s hands with QToys puzzles—where education meets imagination.

Dimensions: 28cm (d)

Recommended age 2+

name: Dinosaur Stones Set of 10
description:
Introducing our Dinosaur Stones Set—a fascinating educational tool designed to spark curiosity and learning in children. This set includes 10 stones, each featuring the name of a dinosaur printed on one side and a vivid picture of the dinosaur on the other.

As children explore these stones, they embark on a journey of discovery, learning to identify the names of different dinosaurs. This engaging activity not only promotes language development but also encourages children to expand their vocabulary as they interact with each stone.

But the learning doesn’t stop there! Our Dinosaur Stones Set also offers opportunities for numeracy development. As children count the stones, they strengthen their ability to recognize and understand numbers—a fundamental skill for mathematical literacy.

Furthermore, as children become familiar with the names of the dinosaurs, they naturally begin to recognize letters, enhancing their literacy skills. This multisensory experience provides a dynamic approach to learning, fostering both language and literacy development in young learners.

Whether it’s exploring the prehistoric world of dinosaurs or mastering essential literacy and numeracy concepts, our Dinosaur Stones Set is the perfect educational resource for young dinosaur enthusiasts. With its engaging design and educational value, this set promises hours of learning and fun for children of all ages.

name: Teeth Puzzle
description:
Our puzzles at Qtoys are made using Australian timber. This particular teeth puzzle includes wooden teeth with the frame along with a wooden toothbrush. It is a great way to encourage your child to brush their teeth. By using this puzzle we can educate our children on good personal hygiene which is extremely important right from their early years. A good healthy routine should occur right from when their first teeth appear. Using this puzzle children can practice how to observe oral hygiene. They can also learn to identify the names of the different teeth as they explore this teeth puzzle.

Puzzles are also an ideal way to stimulate cognitive thinking. They not only promote the development of fine motor skills, but also promotes problem solving, reasoning skills, development of hand-eye coordination, concentration, patience and visual perception as children try to fix the pieces of the puzzle together. By using their logical reasoning, they figure out which piece of the puzzle goes where. Children feel a sense of achievement as they fix the pieces of the puzzle together. This puzzle is a great educational resource to promote dental health for your children.

Made from premium Australian Timber

Approx dimensions: L35xW22xH3cms. Weight 0.5kgs.

Recommended age: 3+
