name: Wooden Play House set of 4
description:
This colourful Wooden Play House set of 4 is an opened ended toy, offering children a perfect opportunity to explore their imaginative skills. Imaginative play is a cornerstone of childhood development, allowing children to enact events or experiences they’ve encountered or found intriguing. Through this play, they craft stories, delve into new ideas, and forge connections with the world around them. Similarly, open-ended play empowers children to freely express their creative thoughts and ideas, fostering language development as they articulate their experiences.

Within the realm of pretend play, children encounter challenges they must navigate, thereby honing their problem-solving skills. Moreover, engaging in pretend scenarios helps toddlers fulfil their emotional needs by providing a platform to express and understand their feelings. Hence, this wooden playhouse set offers more than just entertainment—it serves as a catalyst for holistic development. By providing a canvas for endless imaginative exploration, it nurtures emotional intelligence, fosters language acquisition, and stimulates creative thinking, enriching the developmental journey of young minds.

The Wooden Play House set of 4 is perfect for bright minds with wild imaginations.

name: Tree Number Lacing set
description:
This ‘tree number lacing’ set includes 10 wooden chips with numbers on them from 1-10 along with a string. Our toys at Qtoys are made of natural wood. It is a natural and eco-friendly material which is safe and durable. Since it is made naturally, some imperfections do exist which is all part of the naturalism of the product. Since each piece is carefully manufactured from natural wood, some of the pieces of the products differ in size, shape and colour. No two pieces are the same which adds to the beauty of the product.

Children can use the string to put it through each wooden piece thus promoting the use of their fine motor skills and hand eye coordination. They can also learn to identify and count numbers which leads to numeracy and language development. Stringing the numbers also helps the children to stay focused which in turn helps build their attention span. This set is an exceptional learning resource not only for promoting fine motor skills but also developing their numeracy and literacy development.

Approx dimensions: 20x17x6. Weight 0.4kgs.

Recommended age 3+

name: Wicker Dolls Basket
description:
This Wicker Dolls Basket set is not just a simple plaything—it’s a gateway to a world of imagination and skill development. Comprising both the basket and doll bedding, it opens up endless avenues for creative exploration.

Imagine a child lost in a world of make-believe, where the boundaries of reality blur and fantastical scenarios unfold. That’s the magic of open-ended toys like this set—they invite children to step into their own narratives, to craft stories inspired by their experiences and curiosities. What’s more is through imaginative play, children don’t just play; they learn. They learn to express themselves, to understand the world around them, and to navigate the complexities of life in a safe and nurturing environment.

But it’s not just about fantasy; it’s about learning life skills too. With this wicker doll basket set, children take on the role of caregiver, learning responsibility and empathy as they tend to their doll companions. They face challenges, they problem-solve, they grow. Moreover, as they engage in pretend play, they’re not just developing cognitive abilities; they’re also nurturing their emotional intelligence, learning to recognise and express their own feelings.

In this way, the wicker doll basket set becomes more than just a toy; it becomes a catalyst for growth and development. It provides children with a canvas upon which they can paint their dreams, fostering emotional, imaginative, language, and creative skills that will serve them well throughout their lives. So, as they play with this set, let them explore, let them dream, and watch as they blossom into confident, empathetic individuals.

Approx dimensions: 39x15x34cms. Weight 1.05kgs.

Recommended age 2+

name: Wooden Pestle and Mortar
description:
Introducing our Wooden Pestle and Mortar; making exploring the world of sensory nature and play even more magical. This versatile tool opens up a world of possibilities, perfect for mixing potions, crushing enchanting scents, and infusing sensory play with endless fun.

Imagine children gathering treasures from nature – vibrant flowers, aromatic leaves, and juicy berries – and using the pestle and mortar to transform them into potions of their own creation. With boundless imagination as their guide, they concoct magical mixtures, each one brimming with wonder and possibility.

But the adventure doesn’t stop there. The pestle and mortar become instruments of exploration as children experiment with different materials, from gritty sand to smooth stones and shells. With each grind and crush, they engage their senses, discovering the varied textures and sensations of the world.

Through this hands-on experience, children not only cultivate creativity but also develop sensory awareness. Whether they’re concocting imaginary elixirs or revelling in the tactile delight of crushing materials, our wooden pestle and mortar set brings joy and discovery to every playtime.

Approx dimensions: Mortar measures 14 x 7cms. Pestle measures approx. 13 x 3.5cm

name: Bamboo Counting Set 100 PCS
description:

Let’s explore some of the exciting ways to harness its potential:

  1. Counting Adventures: Dive into the world of numbers by utilizing the pieces for counting exercises. Whether it’s sorting them into groups of ten for easier counting or creating sets for more complex arithmetic, this set lays the foundation for numerical fluency.
  2. Pattern Prowess: Unleash creativity and hone spatial reasoning skills by arranging the pieces to craft captivating patterns and designs. From simple repetitions to intricate motifs, children can embark on a journey of artistic exploration while sharpening their cognitive abilities.
  3. Imaginative Escapades: Transform ordinary playtime into extraordinary adventures with these versatile pieces. Whether they’re pretending to whip up culinary delights in a kitchen play area, playing shopkeeper with the pieces doubling as currency, or adorning a fairy garden with whimsical decorations, the only limit is their imagination. These pieces serve as the perfect props to bring their imaginative worlds to life, fostering creativity and storytelling skills along the way.

From simple addition and subtraction to more advanced concepts like multiplication and division, children can engage in hands-on learning experiences that make math come alive in a tangible and captivating way.
  5. Sensory Sensations: Delve into sensory play as children explore the tactile qualities of the bamboo pieces. Their smooth texture and natural feel provide a sensory-rich experience that enhances tactile perception and sensory awareness.

name: Nesting Fairy Castle
description:

It allows them to create stories and explore new ideas as they connect with the world around them. They express themselves using their words which promotes language development. During their pretend play experiences, children come across challenges which they learn to overcome thus developing their problem-solving skills. Another important benefit of pretend play is, it helps develop your toddlers’ emotional needs as they learn to express and understand their feelings.

Imaginative play plays a crucial role in children’s early learning. It opens the door for children to explore the world around them. This nesting fairy castle is among our series of imaginative play toys. name: Natural Australian Animal Puzzle
description:
This fun and cute animal puzzle is ideal for children to learn about the Australian animals. It includes 10 different animal pieces which the children can figure out which piece goes where on the puzzle board. Therefore, this puzzle is not only a great learning tool to teach children about the Australian animals, but it also promotes the development of their fine motor skills, hand eye coordination as well as language skills as they try to identify the animals.

Completing puzzles takes some time and patience. Practicing patience is one of the best benefits children gain through completing puzzles. Puzzles promote the development of hand-eye coordination, concentration and visual perception as children try to fix the pieces of the puzzle together. Puzzles also promote the development of fine motor skills and problem-solving skills which are useful in life. They also help improve memory as the children try and figure out where the pieces of the puzzles go based on their shape. Children feel a sense of achievement as they fix the pieces of the puzzle. By using their logical reasoning, they figure out which piece of the puzzle goes where. This animal puzzle is ideal for developing their critical thinking skills and it is also a great educational resource to promote cognitive thinking for your children.

name: Wooden Animal Puzzle & Flashcard Matching Set – Montessori Learning Toy
description:
Spark a love for wildlife and learning with this Wooden Animal Puzzle & Flashcard Set. This beautiful 2-in-1 educational resource combines the tactile satisfaction of a wooden puzzle with the cognitive challenge of a matching game.

Designed for toddlers and preschoolers, the set features 10 adorable animals from the jungle and the forest. Children can practice their fine motor skills by fitting the chunky wooden animals into their puzzle bases, then use the accompanying flashcards to learn names and fun facts. It is the perfect screen-free activity to build vocabulary and hand-eye coordination simultaneously.

Key Features & Benefits

  • 10 Adorable Animals: Includes a mix of Safari and Woodland favorites: Lion, Tiger, Elephant, Giraffe, Zebra, Monkey, Bear, Fox, Rabbit, and Squirrel.

  • Double-Sided Educational Cards:

    • Front: Features a cute illustration and the animal’s name in clear English text (great for sight-reading!).

    • Back: Contains interesting facts about the animal (e.g., “Squirrels have bushy tails…”), perfect for parent-child story time.

  • Chunky 3D Design: The wooden animal pieces are thick and raised, making them easy for little hands to grasp, manipulate, and stand upright for pretend play.

  • Montessori-Style Learning: Encourages self-correction (the piece only fits one slot) and real-world association (matching the object to the picture).

  • Safe & Durable: Crafted from high-quality wood with smooth edges and non-toxic, child-safe paints.

Ways to Play & Learn

  1. Shape Matching: Have your child fit the wooden animal into the correct square board. This builds spatial awareness.

  2. Picture Pairing: Lay out the flashcards and ask your child to place the matching wooden animal on top of the card.

  3. Trivia Time: Read the facts on the back of the card (e.g., “I have a long neck…”) and see if your child can guess which animal you are describing before you show them the picture.

  4. Spelling & Reading: Use the clear text on the cards to teach letter recognition and animal names.

What’s Included?

  • 10 x Wooden Puzzle Bases (Square).

  • 10 x Removable Wooden Animal Figures.

  • 10 x Double-Sided Educational Flashcards (English Text).
shortDescription:
Spark a love for wildlife and learning with this Wooden Animal Puzzle & Flashcard Set. This beautiful 2-in-1 educational resource combines the tactile satisfaction of a wooden puzzle with the cognitive challenge of a matching game.

Designed for toddlers and preschoolers, the set features 10 adorable animals from the jungle and the forest. Children can practice their fine motor skills by fitting the chunky wooden animals into their puzzle bases, then use the accompanying flashcards to learn names and fun facts. It is the perfect screen-free activity to build vocabulary and hand-eye coordination simultaneously.

name: Jumbo Stacking Gems
description:
Introducing our Jumbo Stacking Gems: the ultimate open-ended resource for endless fun and creativity! With a whopping 50 pieces of various shapes and sizes, these gems are perfect for stacking and balancing adventures. The largest piece measures an impressive 15 cm, providing ample room for towering constructions.

What sets this set apart is the inclusion of arches and poles, adding a whole new dimension to playtime. These extra elements enhance the uniqueness and versatility of our jumbo stacking gems. Plus, everything neatly packs away into a convenient cotton bag for easy storage.

Construction play is more than just fun—it’s crucial for a child’s development. It’s a hands-on opportunity for children to explore, experiment, and bring their imaginations to life. As they engage with different shapes and structures, they’re not just building towers; they’re building confidence, independence, and essential cognitive skills.

Through construction play, children learn to think critically, make decisions, and work together with their peers. It’s a dynamic process that constantly challenges their minds and fosters creativity. And with our jumbo stacking gems, the possibilities are limitless, providing plenty of opportunities for free expression and cooperative play.

So, whether they’re stacking, balancing, or building, our jumbo stacking gems are the perfect companion for fostering growth, development, and endless hours of fun!

name: Natural Playhouse set of 4
description:
Introducing our set of Natural Playhouse set of 4, crafted from durable acacia wood! These charming structures aren’t just toys; they’re gateways to a world of imagination and creativity for children of all ages.

Imaginative play is more than just fun—it’s a vital component of early learning. It allows children to step into different roles, enact scenarios from their lives, and weave intricate stories inspired by the world around them. These wooden playhouses provide the perfect stage for such adventures, encouraging children to explore, create, and express themselves freely.

But that’s not all. These playhouses also serve as catalysts for open-ended play, where there are no rules or limits to what children can imagine and build. As they engage in this type of play, they learn to communicate their ideas effectively, enhancing their language skills and fostering creativity.

Through pretend play, children encounter obstacles and challenges that they must overcome, nurturing their problem-solving abilities and resilience. Moreover, these playhouses offer a safe space for children to explore and express their emotions, promoting emotional intelligence and empathy.

At Qtoys, we’re passionate about nurturing children’s learning through imaginative play. That’s why we offer a diverse range of toys designed to spark creativity and inspire exploration. With our wooden playhouses, children have endless opportunities to develop their emotional, imaginative, literacy, and creative skills—all while having a blast!

name: Alphabet Jigsaw Set
description:
Are you looking for an effective way to develop your child’s literacy skills? This alphabet jigsaw set is the perfect learning tool to introduce young learners to the letters of the alphabet. The set includes 52 pieces, featuring each letter of the alphabet along with a corresponding picture to match every letter.

As children explore these pieces, they will start to identify the letters, which is essential for literacy and language development. By using these letters, children can learn to write and form words, laying the foundation for effective communication. Learning letters is crucial as they are the building blocks of words and sentences, enabling us to convey ideas and thoughts. Therefore, it’s important to provide children with opportunities to learn and recognise letters.

To make the learning process more manageable, you can introduce a few letters at a time until your child becomes familiar with them, gradually adding more letters. This step-by-step approach helps children not only identify the letters but also associate them with corresponding objects, enhancing their understanding and retention.

This alphabet jigsaw set is an excellent introduction to letters for children, promoting their language and literacy skills. By engaging with the set, children can develop their ability to recognise letters, understand their sounds, and begin forming words, setting a strong foundation for their future reading and writing abilities.

description:

Elevate Learning Through Engaging Mathematics

name: Colour Racing Cars
description:
Unleash Creative Play with Colour Racing Cars

Timeless Fun for Imaginative Minds

Wooden cars have long been cherished as a timeless toy, offering children of all ages a world of excitement and creativity. Our Colour Racing Cars are no exception, providing endless opportunities for imaginative play that captivate young minds and foster a sense of adventure. From zooming down imaginary racetracks to embarking on thrilling adventures, these vibrant cars ignite the imagination and inspire hours of entertainment.

Enhance Motor Skills and Problem-Solving Abilities

  • Motor Skill Development: Engaging with our Colour Racing Cars encourages the development of essential motor skills as children grasp, push, and maneuver the cars across various surfaces. This tactile interaction promotes hand-eye coordination and fine motor control, laying the foundation for dexterity and precision in movement.
  • Creative Problem-Solving: As children immerse themselves in play with our wooden cars, they encounter diverse challenges and obstacles to overcome. Children sharpen problem-solving and critical thinking skills by navigating tracks and devising solutions in a playful environment.

Learn Through Play with Cause and Effect Exploration

  • Understanding Cause and Effect: Playing with wooden cars offers valuable opportunities for children to explore the concept of cause and effect. Experimenting with actions and observing car reactions provides insights into fundamental physics and mechanics. This hands-on learning experience fosters curiosity and scientific inquiry, paving the way for a deeper understanding of the world around them.
  • Spatial Awareness Development: Maneuvering the Colour Racing Cars through diverse terrains and obstacles fosters spatial awareness and perceptual skills. Children learn to gauge distances, anticipate movements, and navigate complex environments with precision and confidence. This spatial reasoning ability extends beyond playtime, benefiting children in various aspects of their cognitive development.

Fuel Imagination and Exploration with Colourful Adventures

Embark on a thrilling journey of creativity and discovery with our Colour Racing Cars. Our vibrant vehicles ignite imaginative play and promise endless excitement, inspiring young adventurers with learning opportunities. Children will delight in boundless adventures racing against friends or embarking on solo expeditions with our Colour Racing Cars.

The wooden zig zag cars go perfect with our zig zag racer set sku 470. Measuring 3cm x 2 cars and 1 car is 6cms.

shortDescription:
Playing with wooden cars can be a fun and engaging activity for children of all ages. These cars are a classic toy that can provide children with hours of imaginative play and can help to develop their motor skills, creativity, and problem-solving abilities. Children can use their imagination to create their own stories and adventures.

Playing with wooden cars can also provide children with opportunities to learn about cause and effect, as they experiment with them in different ways.  It can also help to develop their hand-eye coordination and spatial awareness, as they navigate the cars through different obstacles. The wooden zig zag cars go perfect with our zig zag racer set sku 470. Measuring 3cm x 2 cars and 1 car is 6cms.

Recommended age 2+

name: Shape Sorter
description:
Introduce your child to the world of shapes with our classic Shape Sorter. This timeless toy is designed to provide endless hours of educational fun, promoting important developmental skills.

Key Features:
  • Four Distinct Shapes: The Shape Sorter includes four different shapes—circle, square, triangle, and star—each designed to match with corresponding sorting holes. The shapes are perfectly sized for little hands, making it easy for toddlers to grasp, hold, and manipulate them. This hands-on activity helps to build fine motor skills as children practice picking up and fitting the shapes into their respective slots.
  • Cause and Effect Learning: As children successfully match and insert the shapes into the correct holes, they are rewarded with the satisfying drop of the shape falling into the sorter. Furthermore, this simple yet effective mechanism encourages problem-solving and cognitive development, providing a sense of accomplishment with each successful match.
  • Interactive Play: The Shape Sorter offers more than just sorting fun. The wooden shapes inside create a unique, pleasant sound as the sorter moves, stimulating auditory senses. Moreover, this dual functionality promotes active play and helps to develop gross motor skills as children push and chase the sorter.
  • Developmental Benefits: Beyond the basics of shape recognition and hand-eye coordination, the Shape Sorter provides numerous developmental benefits. It introduces toddlers to fundamental geometric shapes and enhances spatial awareness as they learn to navigate the dimensions and orientations of each piece. This toy also fosters independent play and encourages concentration and patience.
Craftmanship:

Crafted from high-quality, durable wood, our Shape Sorter is built to withstand the rigors of enthusiastic play. Its smooth finish ensures safety, while the natural, non-toxic materials make it a reliable choice for young children. Designed with both educational value and aesthetic appeal in mind, this shape sorter is a beautiful addition to any playroom. It provides endless opportunities for learning and growth.

In conclusion, our Traditional Shape Sorter is more than just a toy; it’s a developmental tool that supports the growth and milestones of your child. Perfect for young toddlers, it combines fun and learning in a way that keeps children engaged and excited about playtime.

Measures 13cmx14cm

name: Screw Mushroom
description:
The screw mushroom is a beneficial tool for developing several important motor skills in children. Here are the key developmental benefits it provides:

  1. Five-Finger Grip: By holding the screw mushroom, children engage all five fingers, which helps strengthen their grip. This is crucial for tasks requiring dexterity and precision.
  2. Rotational Movements of the Wrist: The action of screwing in the head of the mushroom involves twisting and turning the wrist. This rotational movement is essential for activities such as turning doorknobs, using keys, and performing various hand-based tasks.
  3. Fine Motor Skills: The precise action of screwing requires careful coordination between the fingers and the hand. This helps improve fine motor skills, which are necessary for writing, drawing, and other detailed handwork.
  4. Whole Hand Engagement: While focusing on screwing in the mushroom head, children use not only their fingers but also their whole hand. This comprehensive use helps in building hand strength and coordination.

Overall, the screw mushroom is an excellent tool for promoting motor development in a fun and engaging way.

This toy has passed the international standards of toy safety ( ISO8124 part 1). Please follow this link to view a full certificate

name: Count Me Egg Stand
description:
Our Count Me Egg Stand is a fantastic tool for introducing young children to numbers and counting. Here are some engaging ways they can be used for both learning and play:

  • Number eggs are excellent for helping children recognize and learn numbers. With numbers clearly printed on each egg, children can easily associate the numerical symbol with its corresponding quantity. This visual and tactile approach reinforces number recognition in a fun and interactive way.
  • Using number eggs for counting practice is both enjoyable and educational. Children can count the number of eggs or group them into sets to understand the concept of quantities and improve their counting skills. This hands-on activity makes learning to count a more engaging and memorable experience.
  • Number eggs can serve as versatile props in imaginative play scenarios. They can be used as food items in a pretend kitchen, as eggs in a make-believe farm, or even as decorations for a fantasy party. This type of play not only makes learning numbers fun but also fosters creativity and imagination.
  • Handling number eggs helps develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and dexterity in young children. Picking up, manipulating, and sorting the eggs provides valuable practice in these essential physical skills, making learning an all-around developmental activity.

Incorporating number eggs into a child’s playtime offers a multifaceted approach to early education. They promote number recognition, counting, imaginative play, and fine motor skills development. Number eggs are a simple yet powerful resource for making learning fun and effective.

Approx measures: base: 23x10x4.5cms. Eggs: 4cms. Weight: 0.4kgs.

name: Montessori Vertical ring stacker
description:
The Montessori vertical ring stacker is a thoughtfully designed educational toy that aligns with the principles of the Montessori method. Here are the key developmental benefits and features of this toy:

  1. Fine Motor Skills Development: The vertical ring stacker requires children to use precise hand movements to place rings on a peg. This action enhances their fine motor skills, which are essential for tasks such as writing, buttoning clothes, and manipulating small objects.
  2. Hand-Eye Coordination: Successfully placing rings on the stacker demands coordination between what children see and how they move their hands. This improves their hand-eye coordination, a critical skill for everyday activities and sports.
  3. Hands-On Learning: Inspired by the Montessori method, the vertical ring stacker provides a tactile, hands-on learning experience. Children learn best through direct interaction with materials, which helps reinforce concepts and skills.
  4. Independent Discovery: The Montessori approach encourages children to explore and learn independently. The vertical ring stacker allows children to experiment with different ways of stacking the rings, promoting problem-solving skills and self-directed learning.
  5. Cognitive Development: As children work with the ring stacker, they develop cognitive skills such as counting, sorting by size, and understanding spatial relationships. These activities lay the foundation for mathematical and logical thinking.

Overall, the Montessori vertical ring stacker is an excellent tool for fostering a range of developmental skills in children through engaging, hands-on play.

Measures 10x10x12cm

This toy has passed the international standards of toy safety ( ISO8124 part 1). Please follow this link to view a full certificate

name: Mini Stacking Toy
description:
The mini stacking toy, drawing inspiration from the traditional Montessori stacker, offers a simplified yet effective learning experience for toddlers. Here’s how it benefits their development:

  1. Concept of Size: With only three pieces, the mini stacker makes it easy for toddlers to grasp the concept of small, medium, and large. This visual differentiation helps them understand relative sizes and encourages early math concepts.
  2. Hand-Eye Coordination: As toddlers stack the rings onto the peg, they practice hand-eye coordination. This skill is crucial for tasks such as writing, drawing, and using utensils.
  3. Problem Solving: Figuring out the correct order in which to stack the rings involves problem-solving skills. Toddlers learn to analyse and adjust their actions to achieve the desired outcome, fostering critical thinking abilities.
  4. Sensory Stimulation: Using different wood types for each ring provides sensory stimulation through contrasting textures and tones. This engages multiple senses and enriches the learning experience.
  5. Fine Motor Skills: Manipulating the rings and placing them onto the peg strengthens toddlers’ fine motor skills. This is essential for activities that require precise hand movements, such as buttoning clothes and tying shoelaces.

Overall, the mini stacking toy offers a hands-on, multi-dimensional learning experience that aligns with the principles of Montessori education. It promotes cognitive, physical, and sensory development in a simple yet effective manner

Measures 10x10x7cm Dowel: 1.5cm

name: Horizontal Hanger
description:
The Horizontal Hanger is a unique educational toy designed to promote developmental skills in toddlers aged 18 months and older. Here’s how it benefits their growth:

  1. Grasp Development: Unlike traditional stacking toys, the Horizontal Hanger encourages toddlers to use a slightly different grasp as they thread rings onto the horizontal dowel. This variation in grip helps them refine their fine motor skills and hand dexterity.
  2. Added Challenge: The horizontal orientation of the dowel adds an extra challenge for toddlers compared to vertical stacking toys. This encourages them to adapt their hand movements and spatial awareness, promoting problem-solving skills and cognitive development.
  3. Interchangeable Rings: With six interchangeable rings of varying thicknesses, the toy offers customizable difficulty levels. Toddlers can start with thinner rings and gradually progress to thicker ones as they refine their motor skills and coordination. This progressive approach supports individualized learning and fosters a sense of accomplishment as children master new challenges.
  4. Fine Motor Skills: Threading rings onto the dowel requires precise hand movements and coordination, which help strengthen toddlers’ fine motor skills. These skills are essential for activities such as writing, drawing, and self-care tasks.
  5. Developmental Progression: The Horizontal Hanger promotes developmental progression as children transition from using thinner rings to thicker ones. This gradual progression allows toddlers to build confidence and competence at their own pace, laying a solid foundation for future learning and skill development.

Overall, the Horizontal Hanger offers a stimulating and engaging way for toddlers to enhance their fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving abilities while enjoying hands-on play.

Measuring Base size: 100mmx100mm high 100mm

name: Leaf Circle Of Life Puzzle
description:
This ‘leaf circle of life’ puzzle is perfect for teaching children about the different seasons. The leaves of the puzzle consist of different colours of the leaves as they change through each season. This puzzle promotes the development of children’s fine motor skills and hand eye coordination as children attempt to fix the pieces of the puzzle together. Learn the life cycle of a leaf through this fun and exciting puzzle.

Completing puzzles takes some time and patience. Practicing patience is one of the best benefits children gain through completing puzzles. Puzzles promote the development of hand-eye coordination, concentration and visual perception as children try to fix the pieces of the puzzle together. Puzzles also promote the development of fine motor skills and problem-solving skills which are useful in life. They also help improve memory as the children try and figure out where the pieces of the puzzles go based on their shape. Children feel a sense of achievement as they fix the pieces of the puzzle. By using their logical reasoning, they figure out which piece of the puzzle goes where. This leaf circle of life puzzle is ideal for developing their critical thinking skills and it is also a great educational resource to promote cognitive thinking for your children.

Approx dimensions of product: 31x31x2cms Weight: 1kg.

Recommended age: 2+

name: Tactile Learning Board
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text woodmart_inline=”no” text_larger=”no”]

This tactile learning board is an engaging and educational resource designed to help children learn about shapes. It features a board with various shapes that can be unscrewed by turning a bolt, allowing the shapes to be removed. Children can then match each shape back onto the board and screw the bolt in place to secure them.

The process of unscrewing and screwing the shapes promotes the development of fine motor skills, as children must use their fingers and hands in precise ways to manipulate the bolts and shapes. Additionally, this activity helps children learn to identify and recognise different shapes through hands-on experience. The act of unscrewing the bolts requires patience and determination, teaching children the value of persistence and careful work.

Moreover, the tactile learning board enhances hand-eye coordination, as children must align the shapes correctly and screw them into place. This task also improves concentration and visual perception as children focus on fitting the shapes into their corresponding spots on the board. The sense of achievement children feel when they successfully fix the pieces together boosts their confidence and encourages them to take on new challenges.

Using the tactile learning board, children engage in logical reasoning as they figure out which shapes fit where, developing their problem-solving skills. This educational tool not only promotes shape recognition but also fosters cognitive thinking, making it a valuable resource for early childhood development. By incorporating this interactive and hands-on approach, the tactile learning board provides a fun and effective way for children to learn and grow.

Approximate dimensions: 30x30x5cms

Recommended age: 3+

name: Wooden Lowercase Letters
description:
Unlock the wonders of literacy and language development with our Wooden Lowercase Letters—a versatile learning tool designed to ignite curiosity and foster early literacy skills in young children.

A Gateway to Literacy

Comprising 26 lowercase letters, this wooden alphabet set serves as a gateway to the world of letters and words. As children explore the alphabet, they begin to identify letters—an essential foundation for language acquisition and literacy development.

Learn and Create Words

With each letter in hand, children can embark on a journey of discovery as they learn to write and form words. From simple three-letter words to more complex vocabulary, these wooden letters provide endless opportunities for creative expression and language exploration.

Communication and Connection

Letters are the building blocks of communication, forming words and sentences that allow us to connect with one another. By giving children the opportunity to learn and recognise letters, we empower them to become confident communicators and active participants in the world around them.

Progressive Learning Approach

Introduce letters gradually, starting with a few at a time, until your child becomes familiar with each one. As they master each set of letters, gradually introduce new ones, allowing for incremental learning and reinforcement of letter recognition.

Promoting Language and Literacy

Through hands-on exploration and interactive play, our wooden alphabet set promotes language and literacy skills in young learners. As children identify letters and their corresponding sounds, they lay the groundwork for reading, writing, and communication skills that will serve them throughout their lives.

With our Wooden Lowercase Letters, every letter becomes a stepping stone on the path to literacy and language mastery. Spark curiosity, inspire creativity, and empower young learners to unlock the magic of words and communication. This set is made of rubberwood.

Approx dimensions: Weight 0.2kgs

Recommended age: 2+

shortDescription: This wooden alphabet set consists of 26 lowercase letters. As children explore these letters, they will begin to identify the letters of the alphabet which are beneficial for literacy and language development. Children can learn to write and form words by using these letters. Learning letters is extremely beneficial for children as letters form words and sentences and this is how we communicate with one another. Therefore, it is important to give children the opportunity to learn and recognize letters.

name: Capital Letters 26PCE
description:
Our wooden Capital Letters 26PCE set includes 26 uppercase letters, offering a comprehensive tool for early childhood education. As children explore these letters, they begin to identify and recognise each one, a foundational skill crucial for literacy and language development. By interacting with these wooden letters, children can learn to write and form words, gaining an understanding that letters combine to create words and sentences, which are essential for communication. Thus, providing children with opportunities to learn and recognise letters is of paramount importance.

To facilitate this learning process, you can introduce a few letters at a time to your child. Start with a small selection until they become familiar with those letters, then gradually add more as their confidence and knowledge grow. This step-by-step approach helps prevent overwhelming the child and reinforces their learning through repetition and practice. Soon, your child will not only be able to identify all the letters but also associate them with corresponding objects that start with each letter. For example, they might connect the letter “A” with an apple or the letter “B” with a ball.

These wooden letters are more than just a basic educational tool; they provide a tactile and interactive way for children to engage with the alphabet. The physical act of handling the letters can enhance their motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Additionally, these letters can be used in various educational games and activities. For instance, you can create letter-matching games, spell out simple words. You could also use the letters in storytelling activities to make learning more dynamic and enjoyable.

Incorporating these wooden letters into daily learning routines can significantly boost a child’s language and literacy skills. They serve as a great first introduction to the alphabet, making the learning process enjoyable and effective. The tactile experience of holding and moving the letters also supports sensory learning, which is particularly beneficial for young children.

Overall, this wooden alphabet set is an invaluable resource for parents and educators aiming to promote early literacy. It combines the benefits of hands-on learning with the essential skills of letter recognition and word formation, laying a strong foundation for future reading and writing abilities. This set is made of rubberwood.

Recommended age 2+

name: Wooden Phonogram Learning Kit 1
description:
Introducing our Wooden Phonogram Learning Kit 1. This is the first instalment in a series of Qtoys reading materials designed to make learning to read a hands-on and enjoyable experience.

Our Phonogram learning kit applies phonics principles to help young learners develop essential reading skills. What’s more is each high-quality wooden toy in this kit is carefully crafted to embed phonics instruction seamlessly into playtime.

Moreover, our approach is both explicit and systematic, providing young children with a solid foundation in phonics that supports independent learning. After receiving initial guidance from adults, children can explore and engage with the materials independently. This way they can build confidence and proficiency at their own pace.

Systematic phonics instruction is crucial for children as it helps them identify words accurately and automatically. This can ultimately enhance their comprehension of texts. By mastering phonograms and letter-sound correspondences, children develop the essential skills needed to decode words and unlock the meaning of texts as they progress in their reading journey.

Furthermore, this comprehensive set includes 36 letters and corresponding flashcards. This allows children to practice key phonograms such as /ee/, /ai/, /oi/, and /ou/. With engaging activities and interactive learning tools, our Wooden Phonogram Learning Kit 1 sets the stage for a lifetime of reading success.

We acknowledge the contribution of Ms Thy Nguyen, a Montessori educator in Queensland who consulted the educational content of this product.

shortDescription:
This Phonogram learning kit is the first in a series of Qtoys reading materials that  apply the phonics principles to facilitate young users to learn to read in a hands-on and fun way.

The phonics embedded in our high quality wooden toys are designed to be both explicit and systematic to support young children in their independent explorations to learn after the initial guidance from adults. Because systematic phonics instruction helps children learn to identify words, it increases their ability to comprehend what they read. Reading words accurately and automatically enables children to focus on the meaning of texts later on.

This set includes 36 letters and correspondence flash cards to practice the below sounds: /ee/,/ai/,/oi/, and /ou/

In summary, this animal alphabet set offers a multifaceted approach to early childhood education. With its engaging design and thoughtful construction, this set is sure to be a valuable addition to any child’s learning toolkit.

name: Contrast Colour Stacking Bowls
description:
Introducing our Contrast Colour Stacking Bowls Set, a delightful and educational toy designed to captivate and challenge young minds. This set consists of five differently sized bowls, crafted from plantation timber and finished with non-toxic, child-safe materials.

Key Features:

  • Versatile Stacking Options: These bowls can be stacked in two engaging ways. Children can either stack them one on top of the other, creating a colourful tower, or nest them one inside the other, exploring spatial relationships and size differentiation.
  • Size Differentiation: Each bowl in the set varies in size, encouraging children to recognize and compare sizes as they play. This process enhances their reasoning skills, which are essential for problem-solving and cognitive development.
  • Skill Development: Stacking the bowls requires fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and spatial awareness. As children experiment with different stacking methods, they develop these critical skills in a fun and interactive manner.
  • Contrasting Colours: The contrasting colours of the bowls add an extra layer of visual appeal, stimulating children’s senses and keeping them engaged.

Benefits:

  • Cognitive Development: Determining how to stack the bowls correctly stimulates reasoning and problem-solving abilities, essential components of cognitive development.
  • Fine Motor Skills: Handling and stacking the bowls helps children improve their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination, which are crucial for everyday tasks.
  • Open-Ended Play: These bowls offer endless opportunities for imaginative and open-ended play, encouraging creativity and exploration.

Our Contrast Colour Stacking Bowls Set is the perfect addition to any playroom, providing children with hours of educational fun while supporting their developmental journey. Watch as they delight in stacking, nesting, and discovering the endless possibilities these bowls offer.

Approx dimensions of product: L13xW13xH21cms. Weight 0.6kgs.

description:
Introducing our beautiful wooden jumbo counting tray, meticulously crafted to nurture children’s numeracy development in an engaging and interactive manner. Designed with toddlers in mind, this product aims to make learning to write and count a delightful and enjoyable experience.

There are countless ways to utilise this versatile product. Fill the trays with sand for writing or tracing the numbers, providing a tactile and sensory-rich learning experience. Alternatively, use various materials such as beads or small toys for counting activities, promoting hands-on exploration and mathematical understanding. Additionally, the trays can be paired with play dough, offering a fun and creative medium for learning and reinforcing number recognition.

These number trays are seamlessly compatible with our jumbo counting trays set (SKU 580), enhancing the possibilities for open-ended play and exploration. Whether used independently or as part of a larger set, they serve as valuable accessories that inspire curiosity and learning.

As part of our commitment to environmental responsibility, this item is provided as a spare part without packaging, helping to minimize waste and reduce our impact on the environment.

Please note that this listing is for one tray, and you can specify the desired number in the checkout note. However, availability may vary, and our sales team will reach out to discuss the available options once we receive your order, ensuring you receive the tray that best suits your needs.

Elevate your child’s learning journey with our number trays, and embark on a path of discovery and growth together.

name: Wooden Counting and Writing Tray
description:
Enhance Learning with the Wooden Counting and Writing Tray

Are you looking to elevate your child’s educational experience? The Wooden Counting and Writing Tray is an ideal accessory for open-ended play and learning. This tray is a perfect fit for our counting and writing trays set (SKU 486), making it a versatile addition to your child’s educational tools.

Versatility and Educational Benefits

Promoting Numeracy and Literacy

Firstly, the Wooden Counting and Writing Tray provides an excellent platform for children to practice counting and writing. It allows them to engage in hands-on learning, which is crucial for developing early numeracy and literacy skills. By using this tray, children can enhance their number recognition, counting abilities, and writing proficiency. Consequently, it becomes an indispensable tool for both home and classroom environments.

Encouraging Open-Ended Play

In addition to its educational benefits, this tray promotes open-ended play. Children can use it in various creative ways, from sorting objects to practicing their letters and numbers. This type of play encourages creativity, problem-solving, and critical thinking. As they explore different ways to use the tray, they develop cognitive and motor skills that are essential for their overall development.

Sustainable and Eco-Friendly Design

Minimizing Environmental Impact

Furthermore, our Wooden Counting and Writing Tray reflects our commitment to sustainability. As a spare part, it comes without any packaging to minimize environmental waste. This eco-friendly approach ensures that while your child learns and grows, we are also taking steps to protect the environment.

Quality Craftsmanship

Additionally, the tray is crafted from high-quality wood, ensuring durability and longevity. The natural texture and finish provide a tactile experience that enhances sensory learning. This sturdy design means it can withstand the rigors of daily use, making it a reliable educational tool for years to come.

Ordering and Customization

Perfect for Home and Classroom

Finally, whether for home use or in a classroom setting, the Wooden Counting and Writing Tray is a valuable addition. Its compatibility with our existing sets (SKU 486) makes it a seamless extension to your child’s learning resources. Encourage your child’s educational journey with this versatile and sustainable tray, designed to foster a love for learning and creativity.

name: Montessori Inspired Wardrobe
description:
Foster Independence with Our Montessori Inspired Wardrobe

Are you searching for a functional yet stylish addition to your child’s room? Look no further than our Montessori Inspired Wardrobe. This beautifully crafted wardrobe is perfect for any home or learning space, designed specifically to encourage children’s independence and nurture their self-care routines.

Promote Independence and Self-Care

Thoughtfully Designed for Easy Access

Our Montessori Inspired Wardrobe features a convenient hanging rack and three cube shelves, allowing children to easily access their clothes and belongings. This accessibility empowers children to choose their outfits, promoting a sense of freedom and responsibility within safe and age-appropriate limits. Moreover, the design helps foster important life skills such as organization and decision-making.

High-Quality Craftsmanship

Crafted from premium rubber wood, the wardrobe is not only durable but also aesthetically pleasing. The high-quality material ensures the wardrobe will withstand daily use while maintaining its beautiful appearance. Additionally, the natural wood finish seamlessly blends with any décor, making it a versatile piece for any room.

Functional and Practical Design

Perfect for Home and Learning Spaces

Whether used at home or in a learning environment, the Montessori Inspired Wardrobe is an invaluable addition. It provides ample space for children to store their clothes and personal items, making it easier for them to manage their belongings independently. The hanging rack and cube shelves are perfectly sized for young children, making it easy for them to reach and use their wardrobe effectively.

Encourages Responsibility and Organization

Incorporating this wardrobe into your child’s routine helps instill a sense of responsibility and organization. By having their clothes and accessories within reach, children learn to take care of their belongings and manage their space efficiently. This practice not only boosts their confidence but also lays the foundation for essential life skills.

Specifications and Recommendations

Detailed Measurements

  • Overall Measurements: 120cm x 100cm
  • Inside Hanging Compartment: 76cm x 90cm
  • Inside Cube Compartment: 38cm x 32cm

These dimensions are thoughtfully designed to provide ample storage space while remaining accessible for young children. The compact size makes it an ideal addition to smaller rooms without sacrificing functionality.

Age Recommendation and Notes

The Montessori Inspired Wardrobe is recommended for children aged 2 and above. It is designed to support their growing independence and self-care habits in a safe and practical manner. By integrating this wardrobe into your child’s daily routine, you are providing them with the tools they need to become more self-sufficient and organized.

In conclusion, our Montessori Inspired Wardrobe is a must-have for any parent or educator looking to promote independence and self-care in children. Its thoughtful design, high-quality craftsmanship, and practical functionality make it an excellent investment for fostering essential life skills in a supportive and engaging way.

name: Coconut Shell Spoon
description:
Introducing our unique and eco-friendly Coconut Shell Spoon—an innovative alternative to traditional spoons made of plastic or metal. Crafted from coconut shells, a by-product of the coconut industry, these spoons offer a sustainable and earth-conscious choice for your kitchen and beyond.

Coconut shells are carefully cleaned and shaped into the desired spoon form in order to create this beautiful product. The edges are meticulously sanded and smoothed to ensure a comfortable and functional utensil that enhances your dining experience.

Versatile and practical, coconut shell spoons can be used for a variety of purposes. Whether you’re serving food, stirring drinks, or adding them to your children’s play kitchen for imaginative play, these spoons are up to the task. These can withstand daily use as they are both lightweight and durable. To clean, simply use soap and water.

Beyond their practical utility, choosing coconut shell spoons also aligns with sustainable living principles. By utilising a renewable resource that would otherwise be discarded, you’re contributing to waste reduction and promoting environmental sustainability.

So, join us in embracing the beauty of natural materials and making conscious choices for a greener planet. Make the switch to our Coconut Shell Spoon and experience the harmony of functionality, sustainability, and natural beauty in your everyday life.

Approx dimensions: 10cms.

Recommended age: 2+

description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Introducing the latest innovation from QToys Australia: The Montessori Cylinder Post Box.

Stimulate Curiosity and Fine Motor Skills

With its assortment of differently sized cylinders, this engaging toy challenges children to fit each cylinder into its corresponding hole before pulling the drawstring and watching them tumble down. This interactive activity encourages children to explore cause and effect while honing their fine motor skills with each precise placement.

Promote Critical Thinking and Problem-Solving

More than just entertainment, this toy promotes critical thinking and problem-solving skills as children navigate the varying sizes of the cylinders and identify the correct placement for each one. Through experimentation and observation, children develop a deeper understanding of spatial relationships and cultivate essential cognitive skills.

Crafted with Care for Educational Value

Crafted with care by QToys, the Montessori Cylinder Post Box is not only a source of endless fun but also a valuable educational tool. Its thoughtful design encourages exploration and discovery, providing children with opportunities for learning and growth in an engaging and interactive way.

name: Colour Zig Zag Racing Car
description:
This colour zig zag racing car set includes 3 cars with the zig zag racetrack. It is a fun and interactive experience for children through which they can learn colours as well as cause and effect.

Colorful moving objects are always attractive to young children. This zig zag racing car set is perfect for those curious minds. It consists of different colors on the track as well as 3 different coloured cars. Children can be encouraged to identify the colours on the track which promotes color recognition.

Through this activity children can also learn about cause and effect when they release the cars at the top of the track. This also encourages hand-eye coordination. Rolling activities increases a child’s curiosity which also encourage them to ask questions which in turn play an important role in language development. This activity promotes the development of children’s fine and gross motor skills as they pick up the cars and put it onto the track. Your child will love watching the cars roll down the different colored tracks.

Approx dimensions of product: 13x10x40cms. Weight: 2kgs.

name: Adventure Ship
description:
The Adventure Ship is a great toy for children who love imaginative play and adventure. The ship provides a platform for kids to create their own sea-faring stories and scenarios and encourages them to use their creativity and imagination.

Imaginative play is basically when children enact an event or experience in their life that they have come across or found interesting. It allows them to create stories and explore new ideas as they connect with the world around them. As children engage in play, they experiment with decision making and also put their social skills to practice.

Imaginative play is extremely beneficial for children’s growth and development. Children develop their social skills as they learn to take turns and share during their pretend play experiences. They also come across challenges which they learn to overcome thus developing their problem-solving skills. Another important benefit of pretend play is, it helps develop your child’s emotional needs as they learn to express and understand their feelings.

Imaginative play fosters creativity. Children can be anything they possibly like during their pretend play experiences. They are able to act out scenarios which they might not be able to experience in real life. Therefore, this adventure ship provides children with endless opportunities to explore their imagination.

*Mice accessories not included.

Approx dimensions of product: 41x25x12cms. Weight: 1.85kgs.

Recommended age: 2+

name: Aboriginal Symbol wooden stones
description:
Discover the Aboriginal Symbol Wooden Stones

Unlock a world of cultural exploration and learning with our Aboriginal Symbol Wooden Stones. This unique set of small wooden stones features various Aboriginal symbols, each with a rich history and meaning. These symbols have been integral to Aboriginal art, storytelling, and ceremonies for thousands of years, representing their beliefs, values, and experiences.

Cultural Significance

Preserving Traditions

Aboriginal people have used these symbols to pass down their culture and traditions through generations. Each symbol on these wooden stones carries a piece of history, offering a tangible connection to the ancient practices and wisdom of Aboriginal communities. By incorporating these symbols into your child’s playtime, you provide an educational resource that promotes an understanding and appreciation of Aboriginal culture.

Educational Value

Introducing children to Aboriginal symbols through play is a great way to teach them about this rich heritage. These wooden stones can be used in various educational activities, from storytelling sessions to art projects. As children engage with these symbols, they learn about the values, stories, and traditions that have been preserved for millennia, fostering a deeper respect for cultural diversity.

Versatile Learning Tool

These wooden stones are not only educational but also versatile tools for imaginative play. Children can incorporate them into their existing playsets, creating stories and scenarios that enhance their creativity. The tactile experience of handling these smooth, well-crafted stones also helps develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

Interactive Storytelling

Storytelling becomes more interactive and engaging when children can use physical objects to illustrate the tales they hear or create. These Aboriginal Symbol Wooden Stones can serve as prompts or props in storytelling, helping children visualize and better understand the narratives associated with each symbol. This hands-on approach to learning makes cultural education more accessible and enjoyable for young minds.

The Aboriginal Symbol Wooden Stones are designed to offer children an engaging way to explore and respect Aboriginal culture. By integrating these stones into their playtime, you encourage a broader understanding of the world and its diverse cultures.

By repurposing recycled tree branches and utilizing Acacia hardwood, we minimize waste and reduce our ecological footprint. Our tree tables and benches are crafted with care, ensuring that every piece embodies our commitment to eco-friendly practices.

Durable Construction for Years of Enjoyment

We construct our outdoor furniture set from resilient materials, ensuring it withstands the rigors of outdoor play and exploration. From lively games to quiet moments of reflection, children can enjoy countless hours of fun and relaxation on their durable and sturdy tree tables and benches.

Create Lasting Memories Outdoors

name: Toddler Knob Shape Puzzle
description:
Our Toddler Knob Shape Puzzle was designed based off Montessori inspired learning. We intentionally simplified this puzzle to one color. The reasoning behind this is to encourage concentration onto the size sorting and shape recognition of the puzzle pieces making it less overwhelming for your child. Our puzzle is not just a toy but a purposeful educational resource designed to support your child’s growth and learning journey.

Completing puzzles takes some time and patience. Practicing patience is one of the best benefits children gain through completing puzzles. Puzzles promote the development of hand-eye coordination, concentration and visual perception as children try to fix the pieces of the puzzle together.

Puzzles also promote the development of fine motor skills and problem-solving skills which are useful in life. They also help improve memory as the children try and figure out where the pieces of the puzzles go based on their shape. Children feel a sense of achievement as they fix the pieces of the puzzle. By using their logical reasoning, they figure out which piece of the puzzle goes where.

*Approx dimensions: 32x23x2cms. Weight: 1.1kg.

description:

Help your child get ready for math while having fun as they slide the wooden beads back and forth. This two-tone counting stair will encourage them to count and sort whilst developing their fine motor skills. Children feel a sense of accomplishment as they move the wooden beads from one side to the other. Children can also practice their counting skills as they move the beads thus promoting numeracy development. This also sharpens their memory and concentration levels. This counting stair therefore is a great tool to introduce children to early math concepts.

name: Bamboo Channel set of 18 pcs
description:

It includes 18 pieces which can be used to create a pathway for the water to go along the track. Or children can simply use their imaginative skills as they try and build something using these bamboo channels. Thus, these bamboo channels are great learning tools to promote those sensory learning experiences.

Water play is an open-ended experience where children have no limits. They use opportunities they come across to problem solve. It also allows children to freely express themselves creatively. They can learn various concepts such as wet and dry, full and empty through water play experiences. They can also learn about cause and effect.

Children engage in imaginative play as they freely express themselves through water play. They expand their social skills as they learn to work collaboratively with their peers. Water play also promotes children’s’ language development as they try and communicate their thoughts to their family and friends thus developing their vocabulary. These water play experiences not only promotes hand eye coordination but it also encourages social development and promotes sensory learning.

The early years are a significant period of brain development. Children use their senses as they explore the world around them. According to research conducted, sensory play shapes nerve connections in children’s brains. Therefore, it is necessary to provide children with opportunities for them to actively participate in experiences where they can use their senses which promotes brain development. Hence water play using these bamboo channels offers a good pathway for sensory exploration through water play.

name: Montessori Egg, Ball and Cup set
description:
Our Montessori Egg, Ball and Cup set stands as an exceptional introduction for inquisitive toddlers, fostering a myriad of developmental skills. Comprising three distinct pieces—the egg, ball, and square shape—it presents children with the delightful challenge of determining their rightful placements. Placing the ball snugly within the cup not only refines hand-eye coordination but also hones fine motor skills, mirroring the benefits garnered from maneuvering the egg and square shape into their designated spots.

This engaging activity mirrors the allure of a puzzle, encouraging independent exploration and problem-solving. Alongside the gratification of completion, children cultivate patience, an essential virtue intertwined with the development of hand-eye coordination, concentration, and visual perception. Moreover, the intricate nature of this task nurtures fine motor skills and problem-solving acumen, attributes indispensable in navigating the complexities of everyday life. As children meticulously recall the placements of each piece, their memory retention receives a noteworthy boost, amplifying their sense of accomplishment.

Within this interactive pursuit, children inherently grasp the concept of cause and effect, particularly when they release the ball. Furthermore, the rolling activities inherent in this set stimulate curiosity, prompting queries that serve as catalysts for literacy development.

Our Qtoys have been designed to be welcoming, playful, safe and interactive. These early learning toys therefore offer endless development opportunities for your young ones. Moreover, our range is chemical free perfect for children.

name: Name A Shape Flower
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”” woodmart_inline=”no” text_larger=”no”]

Explore Shapes and Colors with Name A Shape Flower

Introduce your child to the fascinating world of shapes and colors with our Name A Shape Flower puzzle. This educational tool is designed to engage young minds in a fun and interactive learning experience, combining vibrant colors and recognizable shapes with descriptive names.

Educational Benefits of Shape Puzzles

Cognitive Development and Hand-Eye Coordination

Playing with a shape puzzle that features names and colors offers numerous cognitive benefits for children. As they manipulate the puzzle pieces, they enhance their understanding of shapes and colors while refining their hand-eye coordination. This hands-on approach to learning fosters cognitive growth and spatial awareness in an enjoyable and engaging way.

Problem-Solving Skills

Engaging in puzzle-solving activities challenges children to think critically and problem-solve as they determine the correct placement of each shape. Through trial and error, they develop perseverance and resilience, essential qualities for overcoming obstacles and finding solutions in various situations.

Promoting Developmental Skills Through Play

Fine Motor Skill Enhancement

Completing a shape puzzle requires precise manipulation of small objects, which enhances fine motor skills and dexterity in children. As they grasp, maneuver, and fit each piece into place, they strengthen the muscles in their hands and fingers, laying the foundation for future writing and drawing tasks.

Encouraging Logical Reasoning and Memory

As children analyze the shapes and colors on each puzzle piece, they engage in logical reasoning to determine the correct arrangement. Additionally, the process of repeatedly placing and rearranging the pieces stimulates memory retention, improving their ability to recall information and recognize patterns.

Fostering a Sense of Achievement

Successfully completing a shape puzzle instills a sense of accomplishment and pride in children, boosting their self-esteem and confidence. With each piece they fit into place, they gain a deeper understanding of spatial relationships and shape recognition, reinforcing their learning and motivation to explore further.

Product Details

  • Dimensions: 28x28x3cm
  • Weight: 0.5kg
  • Recommended Age: 2+
  • Material: Durable and child-safe construction

Ignite Curiosity and Learning

With our Name A Shape Flower puzzle, children embark on a captivating journey of discovery and learning. Through hands-on exploration and problem-solving, they develop essential skills that lay the foundation for academic success and lifelong learning. Join us in nurturing young minds and fostering a love for learning through engaging and educational play experiences.

name: Australian Wildlife and Landscape
description:
This Australian Wildlife and Landscape set includes the Australian animals along with the trees which the children can put together like a puzzle. Animal lovers will absolutely enjoy this set as they explore the animals in their pretend play experiences. This set provides children with the opportunity to identify the Australian animals and learn more about them. Children can also attempt to fit the animal pieces into the trees which promotes their fine motor skills.

Imaginative play is when children enact an event or experience in their life that they have come across or found interesting. It allows them to create stories and explore new ideas as they connect with the world around them. Similarly open-ended play is also a kind of play that encourages children to freely express their creative thoughts and ideas. They express themselves using their words which promotes language development.

During their pretend play experiences, children come across challenges which they learn to overcome thus developing their problem-solving skills. Another important benefit of pretend play is, it helps develop your toddlers’ emotional needs as they learn to express and understand their feelings. name: Natural Lowercase Puzzle
description:
Our natural lower-case puzzle is a great way to introduce children to the letters of the alphabet. As children explore these letters, they will begin to identify the letters of the alphabet which are beneficial for literacy and language development. Children can learn to write and form words by using these letters. Learning letters is extremely beneficial for children as letters form words and sentences and this is how we communicate with one another. Therefore, it is important to give children the opportunity to learn and recognize letters. Children can also attempt to fix the letters in the right spot thus promoting the use of their fine motor skills.

Completing puzzles takes some time and patience. Practicing patience is one of the best benefits children gain through completing puzzles. Puzzles promote the development of hand-eye coordination, concentration and visual perception as children try to fix the pieces of the puzzle together. Puzzles also promote the development of fine motor skills and problem-solving skills which are useful in life. Children feel a sense of achievement as they fix the pieces of the puzzles. By using their logical reasoning, they figure out which piece of the puzzle goes where thus also improving their memory.

Soon your child will be able to identify the letters as well as the corresponding objects that start with each letter. This wooden puzzle is a great first introduction to letters for children and this in turn promotes their language and literacy skills.

All materials used are child-safe and non-toxic. Please note colors may vary slightly to images.

name: Jumbo Counting Trays
description:
Introducing our beautiful Jumbo Counting Trays – an essential tool for enhancing children’s numeracy development. These trays are meticulously designed to provide toddlers with a fun and interactive way to learn counting and number recognition. Made from premium Australian Timber, these counting trays offer durability and a natural aesthetic that fits perfectly into any learning environment.

Our Counting Trays feature numbers from 0 to 9, each tray thoughtfully crafted to facilitate various learning activities. The product comes in a sturdy wooden box, ensuring easy storage and organization. With this versatile set, children can engage in numerous educational activities that make learning numbers enjoyable and effective.

One of the primary uses of these counting trays is for writing and tracing numbers. By filling the trays with sand, children can trace the numbers with their fingers or a stylus, enhancing their fine motor skills and reinforcing number formation. This tactile experience helps solidify their understanding of each number’s shape and structure.

In addition to sand tracing, the Jumbo Counting Trays can be used with different materials for counting exercises. Children can place small objects such as beads, pebbles, or buttons into the trays, matching the quantity with the number represented. This hands-on approach not only reinforces counting skills but also introduces basic concepts of addition and subtraction as children manipulate the materials.

Furthermore, the counting trays are perfect for creative play with play dough. Children can roll out the dough and press it into the trays, creating fun, tactile representations of each number. This activity combines sensory play with numeracy, making learning both enjoyable and memorable.

name: Wooden Human body Anatomy Puzzle
description:
Make biology fascinating and fun with the QToys Wooden Human Body Anatomy Puzzle. This hands-on educational resource is designed to help children visualize and understand the inner workings of their own bodies.

Beautifully crafted from sustainable timber, this puzzle moves beyond simple matching. It is a complete learning system that pairs tactile wooden organ pieces with informative flashcards. It answers the curious questions children have about their bodies, such as “Where does my food go?” or “What helps me breathe?”—making it a perfect addition to any homeschool curriculum or classroom science corner.

Key Features & Educational Benefits

 

  • Detailed Organ Representation: Features chunky, colorful wooden pieces representing vital organs including the Brain, Lungs, Heart, Liver, Stomach, Kidneys, and Intestines.

  • Educational Flashcards Included: Comes with a set of double-sided cards. One side shows the illustration of the organ, while the reverse side provides simple facts about “Who am I?”, “What do I do?”, and “How to keep me healthy.”

  • Promotes STEM Learning: Introduces complex biological concepts in an age-appropriate, accessible way. It encourages scientific curiosity and body awareness.

  • Fine Motor Development: Placing the puzzle pieces into their correct slots helps refine hand-eye coordination and spatial reasoning.

  • Sustainable & Safe: Made from high-quality plantation timber and finished with non-toxic, child-safe paints. The natural wood grain adds a beautiful, sensory element to the toy.

  • Conversation Starter: The “How to keep me healthy” tips on the cards (like drinking water or exercising) provide a great opportunity for parents to discuss healthy lifestyle choices with their kids.

What’s in the Box?

  • 1 x Large Wooden Human Body Board (Torso/Profile shape).

  • Removable wooden organ pieces (Brain, Lungs, Heart, Liver, Stomach, Kidneys, Intestines).

  • Set of Educational Flashcards with facts.

name: CVC Dual Boards
description:
Introducing our CVC Dual Boards, a set of wooden educational tools carefully crafted to aid children in their journey of learning to read and spell CVC (Consonant-Vowel-Consonant) words. This set includes two sturdy wooden boards, each adorned with a grid to accommodate 21 consonant tiles and 5 vowel tiles. Additionally, there are two tiles each for the letters “C” and “D,” providing ample resources for interactive learning sessions.

These wooden boards serve as engaging platforms for children to explore the fundamentals of phonics and word formation. By manipulating the consonant and vowel tiles, children can experiment with blending and segmenting letters to construct simple CVC words. This hands-on approach to learning not only reinforces letter-sound correspondence but also enhances phonemic awareness and decoding skills.

The simplicity and elegance of the wooden boards make them both visually appealing and conducive to focused learning. The natural texture and warmth of the wood create an inviting learning environment, encouraging children to immerse themselves in the learning process. Whether used independently or with guidance from educators or caregivers, these boards provide a versatile tool for reinforcing literacy concepts in a fun and interactive way.

Beyond academic benefits, the CVC Dual Boards offer opportunities for creative expression and language development. As children manipulate the letter tiles to form words, they engage in imaginative play and storytelling, fostering communication skills and expanding vocabulary. The open-ended nature of the activity encourages experimentation and self-expression, empowering children to take ownership of their learning journey.

All Qtoys products are made from plantation wood and non-toxic materials.

name: Coco Ladle
description:
The Coco Ladle embodies the cultural heritage of Viet Nam, where traditional craftsmanship meets the natural bounty of the coconut tree. Each ladle is meticulously handcrafted, ensuring no two are exactly alike. This uniqueness adds character and charm!

Widening its significance, the Coco Ladle serves as a connection to Viet Nam’s history and traditions. Used for generations to scoop water from buckets, it carries with it the stories of countless households and the daily rituals of life. Its coconut shell bowl, combined with a handle crafted from coconut wood, symbolizes sustainability and resourcefulness.

Beyond its utilitarian function, the ladle is a piece of functional art, blending form and function seamlessly. The natural variations in size and shape of the coconut shell bowl only enhance its aesthetic appeal, making each scoop a unique experience. Its smooth coconut wood handle provides a comfortable grip, ensuring ease of use for tasks both practical and ceremonial.

Moreover, the Coco Ladle transcends its cultural origins to become a symbol of eco-conscious living. Crafted from renewable materials, it embodies a commitment to sustainability and environmental stewardship. By choosing the Coco Ladle, we not only embraces a piece of Vietnamese heritage but also contributes to a greener, more sustainable future.

name: Wooden Rainmaker
description:
The Wooden Rainmaker is a delightful musical instrument that brings the soothing sound of rainfall to life. When you hold the rainmaker vertically and gently tilt it back and forth, the objects inside cascade through the tube, mimicking the gentle patter of raindrops. This instrument doesn’t just produce calming sounds; it also engages the senses, making it an ideal toy for curious thinkers.

The Wooden Rainmaker’s tactile nature invites hands-on exploration. As you tilt the rainmaker, you can feel the objects moving inside, creating a rhythmic sensation that enhances the auditory experience. This interaction makes the rainmaker a fantastic tool for sensory development, especially for young children who are just beginning to explore the world around them.

In addition to its sensory benefits, the rainmaker encourages curiosity and imagination. Children and adults alike can marvel at how a simple tilt can produce such a mesmerizing sound. The rainmaker sparks questions about how the objects inside create different rhythms and patterns, leading to explorations of sound, gravity, and motion.

In addition to being a musical instrument, the wooden rainmaker is also a popular sensory toy for young children. The sound of the falling objects can be calming and soothing, making it a useful tool for promoting relaxation and sensory development. Children can also learn about cause and effect as they tilt the rainmaker back and forth.

name: Peapod Math Set
description:
Introducing the Peapod Math Set, a comprehensive and engaging tool designed to enhance mathematics and numeracy skills in children. This set includes 27 pieces, making it an ideal resource for both classroom and home learning environments.

The pods measure as follows: the pod with six spots is 46 cm long, the pod with five spots is 39 cm long, and the pod with three spots is 24 cm long.
